programme.desc: MK encuentra refugio en un lugar inesperado y peligroso, mientras que la lealtad de Sunny se pone a prueba cuando Quinn intenta obligarlo a cometer un acto incalificable.

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Cuando Sunny asegura su escapa de la Fortaleza, Quinn comienza a sospechar, mientras que las decisiones de La Viuda la ponen en camino a un conflicto con Sunny y MK.

programme.desc: Sunny y MK luchan por escapar de las garras de Quinn, de una vez por todas, mientras que los enemigos del Barón conspiran para derrocarlo y cambiar las Badlands para siempre.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Karime le hacen un amarre a sus amados y Nacha explota contra Jey. Potro sorprende a Isa besando a Chile y se molesta. Mane se entera de que Potro está hablando mal de Jawy y toma cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La situación entre Jawy y Potro es cada vez más tensa. Las nuevas se lanzan topless de la tirolesa. Nacha confronta a Isa, mientras que Jawy decide que la playa es el lugar perfecto para aclarar las cosas con Potro.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Talía llega de sorpresa y los lleva de fiesta. Nacha va al hospital. Chile por fin corona con Isa. Los Shores tienen una sesión con Silvia Olmedo; Karime vuelve con Ramiro y trae ganas de trío. Entre Fer e Isa hay pleito de celos por Chile.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores se preparan para el fin de la aventura en Mazatlán. Los invitados llegan a celebrar la fiesta final. Potro y Tadeo aparecen cuando ya está el pleno desmadre y un incidente entre las mujeres de Chile está a punto de explotar.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final termina en pleito entre el harén de Chile. Mane le prepara a Jawy una ceremonia sorpresa para ratificar su amor. Los Shores se van de la casa, pero Karime y Potro dejan lo mejor para el final.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión, Acapulco será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta continua y el capitán desata la primera crisis en la casa. La tensión entre Isa y Fernanda crece con un descenlace inesperado y la llegada de Nacha sorprende a todos en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El boss aparece por primera vez. Los Shores descubren que la casa tiene un antro. La relación entre Alba y Fer se hace más fuerte mientras que Nacha le deja saber a Jacky que se le hace una falsa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El capitán regresa a la casa Shore. Un viaje en Catamarán genera un enfrentamiento entre Alba y Chile, mientras que a Fernanda le dañan una noche de pasión y Nacha explota contra Jacky.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jaylin se abre con los Shores y les cuenta su historia. El grupo se relaja en un beach club pero los problemas siguen. Jaylin y Capitán discuten y la situación entre Nacha y Jacky se sale de control.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores vuelven a la casa en autobús y lo que parecía que iba a ser un viaje relajado y divertido, se convierte en un todos contra todos. El Boss se presenta oficialmente y un nuevo integrante llega.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El Team Tendo le organiza una fiesta de 15 a su Matrioska y los Shores se entregan al festejo como solo ellos saben hacerlo. Todo es diversión hasta que una discusión inesperada excede todos los límites.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con la reciente expulsión de Capitán y las mujeres arrancándose las extensiones completamente fuera de sí, los shores prometen descontrolar Acapulco como si fuera la primera vez.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La Matrioska agasaja a sus amigos y organiza un picnic inclusivo, en el cual los Shores abren sus corazones. Con el ánimo al tope, los Shores desfilan por Acapulco y organizan la iniciación de Isa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: A special guest hits the wildest house in Acapulco looking for revenge and promises to heat things up. The welcome party involves a lot of fun, live music, drinks, and things getting out of control, as usual.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Acapulco never sleeps and surprises never end. Matheus joins the gang and changes the dynamics in the house. Women are crazy about the new housemate and will fight to win him over by setting free all their charms.

programme.desc: Matheus and Charlotte cheer things up in the port of Acapulco. The Boss surprises the gang with a live recital by Justin Quiles and things burst into a party. Nacha has a crush on Matheus and Diego is boiling with jealousy.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Alba's initiation is a success, but Jacky uses Altafulla to bother her. A woman visits the house and Carlos falls for her while José and Beni fight over Karime.

programme.title: Hustle & Soul
programme.desc: Lawrence's confession backfires when Ana freaks out. A shocking staff firing shakes up the team and divides loyalties. Candice drops a bombshell about a threesome with Lawrence and Ana.

programme.title: Hustle & Soul

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Tencha le dice a Basilio que Leonardo se casará con Cocó y se mudará a su casa. Yesenia descubre que su abuela no está parapléjica. Santiago tiene un aneurisma, su vida peligra y Fernanda decide buscar un médico que lo opere.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio se presenta ante Cocó como vidente, le dice que en su vida hay una gran mentira y que debe decir la verdad. Pedro visita a Santiago, se entera de que tiene una hermana y de su gravedad. El Chamoy sale de la cárcel.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo encuentra a Inés y a Jonathan besándose, les da su apoyo. Basilio y Pedro planean impedir la boda de Leonardo y Cocó. Fernanda le dice a Pedro que se casen, él le pide tiempo. Yesenia y Sara se amenazan mutuamente.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Cocó se arrepiente y le dice toda la verdad a Leonardo. Humberto le dice a Pedro que debe despedir a Basilio, pero él no está de acuerdo. Paloma se pone celosa al ver a Leonardo con Renata. Pedro e Ignacio se enfrentan por Fernanda.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma le dice a Leonardo que le debe una disculpa, se besan. Basilio impide que Pedro los vea, le dice que debe reconquistar a Fernanda. Humberto ordena despedir a Basilio, pero Pedro no está de acuerdo. Santiago despierta.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda le pide a Pedro que firme unos documentos y él lo hace sin siquiera leerlos. Ignacio le pide disculpas a Pedro. Inés tiene miedo por el regreso del Chamoy. Ivonne le dice a Basilio que tiene novio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le pregunta a Fernanda qué documentos firmó y ella responde que el acuerdo con los españoles. Se los entrega a Ignacio. Leonardo desconfía del Chamoy. Basilio está despechado porque Ivonne e Ignacio son pareja.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo le dice a Paloma que quiere hacer el amor con ella. Pedro convence al doctor para que opere a Santiago. Armando extorsiona a Fabiola y Humberto vuelve a sospechar. Perico le propone matrimonio a Fernanda.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda acepta casarse con Pedro. Ivonne le cuenta a Ignacio sobre la pérdida de dinero que sufrió la empresa por culpa de Leonardo. Jonathan le propone matrimonio a Inés y ella acepta. Armando recibe un disparo mortal.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: La policía se lleva a Humberto, mientras Pedro anuncia su boda con Fernanda. Inés le dice a todos en casa que ella y Jonathan están enamorados. Fabiola le pregunta a Ignacio por qué mató a Armando, él dice que no lo hizo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio le paga a Elmer por el asesinato de Armando. Pedro le dice a Basilio que necesitan un plan para recuperar la confianza de Humberto. El Chamoy se entera de la relación entre Inés y Jonathan, la acusa de engañarlo. Connie se va de la casa.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fabiola le pregunta a Ignacio si él mató a Armando, él deja el teléfono descolgado y Fernanda lo escucha. Leonardo le advierte a Elmer que no se meta con Jonathan. Humberto anuncia que Ignacio será el nuevo director general.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo se reúne con Renata, decide probar con la hipnosis para recuperar sus recuerdos. Ignacio le dice a Fernando que él no mató a Armando. Elmer le dice a Melquiades que necesita pasar la noche bebiendo con él. Apuñalan a Inés.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro va al hospital, se entera de lo que le pasó a Inés y decide entrar a verla. Cuando está dentro de la habitación, llega Leonardo. Elmer se reúne con quienes atacaron a Jonathan e Inés. Leonardo comienza a recordar.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Who doesn't like a plate of good nachos or Buffalo wings? We discover when you can use supermarket products versus when only good, fresh ingredients will do. A simple, sweet-tart sangria finishes our party menu.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Simple yet interesting, both chicken Milanese and chicken piccata are reliable test kitchen favorites. We like to start them on the stovetop but finish the cooking in the oven

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen provides foolproof recipes for two classic pasta sauces: puttanesca and Bolognese.

programme.title: Cook's Country

programme.title: Cook's Country

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Gorditas, New Mexico Biscochitos; review of tortilla presses

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Roasted Beef Chuck Roast, Torn & Fried Potatoes; Creamed Spinach; review of kitchen timers

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia cooks her favorite beef chili with black beans and chipotle, easy baked white rice, and watermelon-lime agua fresca.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes crispy pan-fried pork chops, roasted butternut squash salad with za'atar and parsley, and a super-simple spinach salad.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia celebrates with an indoor clambake made with fresh lobster, mussels, and clams, and served with honey cornbread and bistro slaw.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: It's burger night in the Davison house and Julia's got all the fixings: home ground beef, crispy homefries, and her all-time favorite condiment, homemade pickled onions.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta with garlic and oil is perhaps the most famous quick pasta dish. It starts with ingredients on hand—garlic, good olive oil, hot red pepper flakes—and turns them into something special and uncommonly good.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We uncover the secrets to beef Burgundy at its best—and also show you a way to make portions of it ahead of time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ham dinner—with green bean casserole—is classic American fare. But which kind of ham should you buy? And can you really make a "good" green bean casserole? We show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Chili is probably America's favorite one-pot supper and we wanted to create a great, simple version. And while no one thinks of a clambake as a one-pot wonder, we set out to make an indoor version simple enough to prepare even on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we figure out the best recipes for two New Orleans favorites—Jambalaya and bananas Foster.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tomatoes and pasta are a classic (and delicious) pairing, but sometimes you want a change. Vegetable sauces, like the two featured in this episode—one with mushrooms and one with broccoli rabe—are appealing options.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork producers have worked so hard to remove fat from their pigs that most pork roasts have little character. Glazing a pork roast with maple syrup is an attractive way to boost flavor and we wanted to perfect this recipe.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Truckers often know where to find the best home-style cooking. And what could be better than chicken-fried steak with cream gravy and real coconut cream pie?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lan Lam makes Bridget Lancaster Cranberry Curd Tart with Almond Crust. Jack Bishop challenges Julia Collin Davison to a tasting of blue cheeses. Keith Dresser makes Julia Wheat Berry Salad with Radicchio, Dried Cherries, and Pecans.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The members of the Phantom Troupe go to Zazan's nest to defeat her. The Troupe splits up to confront Zazan's minions individually. As they battle, each member of the Troupe reveals their secret ability.

programme.desc: Gon and Killua arrive in a village in East Gorteau but find no trace of the inhabitants.

programme.desc: Japan, 1987. Jotaro Kujo, a descendant of the Joestar family, is in prison and claims he is being possessed by an evil spirit. His grandfather, Joseph Joestar, immediately departs for Japan, where he must reveal the family's terrible secret.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Who Will Be the Judge!?
programme.desc: Jotaro returns to his normal life while keeping his "Stand" power a secret. But on the way to school one day he meets a new transfer student named Noriaki Kakyoin and sustains a strange injury.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Curse of DIO
programme.desc: Jotaro defeats Kakyoin with his Stand power, but as he attempts to glean information from his adversary about DIO, Joseph notices a sinister connection.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Tower of Grey
programme.desc: The Joestars must defeat DIO within 50 days or Holly's life is forfeit. With no time to lose, they head for Egypt where DIO is thought to be hiding but end up encountering a new threat along the way.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Silver Chariot
programme.desc: Jotaro and his comrades are attacked by Polnareff, an assassin with a Stand called "Silver Chariot" that is capable of lightning-fast swordplay. It falls to Avdol to face down the threat using "Magician's Red.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dark Blue Moon
programme.desc: Jotaro welcomes a new member to the team and the group leaves for Singapore by ship. Along the way, a young stowaway is found and Jotaro comes under attack, but is the child the source of this latest evil?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Strength
programme.desc: Jotaro’s group is rescued when they spot a giant cargo ship, but they soon find that the only occupant is a strange orangutan. Curious, they begin to explore the ship and solve its mysteries.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.desc: The Joestars must defeat DIO within 50 days or Holly's life is forfeit. With no time to lose, they head for Egypt where DIO is thought to be hiding but end up encountering a new threat along the way.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Silver Chariot
programme.desc: Jotaro and his comrades are attacked by Polnareff, an assassin with a Stand called "Silver Chariot" that is capable of lightning-fast swordplay. It falls to Avdol to face down the threat using "Magician's Red.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dark Blue Moon
programme.desc: Jotaro welcomes a new member to the team and the group leaves for Singapore by ship. Along the way, a young stowaway is found and Jotaro comes under attack, but is the child the source of this latest evil?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Strength
programme.desc: Jotaro’s group is rescued when they spot a giant cargo ship, but they soon find that the only occupant is a strange orangutan. Curious, they begin to explore the ship and solve its mysteries.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jotaro and his companions finally make it to a hotel in Singapore, but soon Polnareff falls into a trap set by a dangerous and brutal enemy.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Is this the end of the world?

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The Dark Warlord is after the Ronin Warriors.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Mia and Ully uncover Ryo's sword.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Talpa has a new challenge for the Ronin Warriors.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The Three Royal Guards kneel down to respectfully welcome the Chimera Ant King, but by doing so they signal the end of their allegiance to the Queen.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Colt surrenders and seeks the help of the extermination team to help the dying Queen.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: After losing to Knuckle and Shoot, Gon and Killua return home to Palm.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: While Gon is on his date with Palm, Killua encounters Rammot in the forest. Just when their battle is about to begin, Killua hears his brother's voice in his head, telling him to run away.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle and Morel appear to be overwhelmed by the speed of Cheetu's attacks, but they have a chance at victory.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kalluto, Feitan, Shalnark, Phinks, Shizuku, and Bonolenov meet in Meteor City, the home of the Phantom Troupe. They have returned after getting the news that the Chimera Ant, Zazan, has built her nest in their city.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The members of the Phantom Troupe go to Zazan's nest to defeat her. The Troupe splits up to confront Zazan's minions individually. As they battle, each member of the Troupe reveals their secret ability.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua arrive in a village in East Gorteau but find no trace of the inhabitants.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Man Possessed by an Evil Spirit
programme.desc: Japan, 1987. Jotaro Kujo, a descendant of the Joestar family, is in prison and claims he is being possessed by an evil spirit. His grandfather, Joseph Joestar, immediately departs for Japan, where he must reveal the family's terrible secret.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Who Will Be the Judge!?
programme.desc: Jotaro returns to his normal life while keeping his "Stand" power a secret. But on the way to school one day he meets a new transfer student named Noriaki Kakyoin and sustains a strange injury.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil devours tree sap in the Highlands and a wee scone in Scone, while Tim joins the Highland charge at Killiecrankie. But whose Scottish antiques will shine in Worcestershire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim takes the high road while Phil sails the slow boat through the Cotswolds. Phil hopes an old porthole will help him catch Mr Moneybags, who has high hopes for a brass top hat.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim looks ever more sporty on his bike, while Phil is out of his comfort zone in the treetops. Tim's out in front but the road ahead is rocky and Tarzan is looking dangerous!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Phil's last chance to catch Tim as he gets on his bike in the rain. Tim splashes out on silver and Phil takes a punt on some railway memorabilia as the end whistle blows.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trip rookie Serhat Ahmet joins frequent tripper Christina Trevanion for a mooch around the antique shops of North Wales. Will there be an upset at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Porcelain dealer Serhat Ahmet and jewelry fan Christina Trevanion play to their strengths in the antiques shops of the West Midlands. Plus, an insight to Tudor cleanliness.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Christina Trevanion and Serhat Ahmet go out of their comfort zones in their search for old treasures, hitting the shops from Sheffield to Coventry.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Christina Trevanion and Serhat Ahmet scour the shops of Bristol and pig sties of Gloucestershire for items of interest, both small and very, very large.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last chance for Christina Trevanion and Serhat Ahmet to buy antiques in South Wales, but they're distracted by an underground secret and plunge into a bog for fun.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie brushes up on her Bronze Age DIY skills in Hampshire while Catherine is getting to grips with a grisly hedgerow. Who will conquer the auction in Leicestershire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In North Devon Izzie finds some very old porcelain and Catherine samples an ancient pasty recipe. Both experts purchase some interesting antiques in hope of making a big profit.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the North coast of Cornwall, Izzie channels her inner surf dude and Catherine observes the ancient art of Cornish wrestling. Who'll be crowned the champ at the auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In South Devon Izzie gets in a flap about a dress while Catherine gets swept up in the story of a village lost to the sea. Both hope for profits from railwayana and violins.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer visits a top secret location and makes a discovery while Catherine Southon buys some Georgian shoe buckles and an anchor. Izzie plans an upset at the final auction.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A visit to Scone Palace, near Perth in Scotland, sees Fiona Bruce and the team meeting thousands of visitors bringing precious heirlooms.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The first of two specials marking the centenary of the outbreak of World War I. Fiona Bruce travels to the poignant Thiepval Memorial.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a return visit to the Royal Agricultural University at Cirencester in the Cotswolds.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the antiques experts pay a return visit to Polesden Lacey near Dorking in Surrey for one of the busiest days in Roadshow history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts are at Gregynog in Wales at the former home of the wealthy Davies sisters, who helped bring art to the people of Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Jolly Roger flag counts among the family treasures presented to the Roadshow team in a return visit to Southsea.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures featured include Chinese objects which revealed a shocking family secret and rare artworks by the sculptor Elisabeth Frink.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A sketchbook believed to have been made on the journey from England to Australia in 1851 aboard the S.S. Great Britain is brought in for inspection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit the Royal Ballet School in Richmond Park where they find a table purportedly made from the Old London Bridge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects in this episode include a rare 18th-century glass bought for 10p from a charity shop and a pair of Queen Victoria's amazingly large knickers.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts travel to Wentworth Woodhouse, a palace in south Yorkshire where they encounter a bureau once owned by Earl Fitzwilliam.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects under inspection include a special medal awarded for kindness to pit ponies and a valuable painted Georgian tea tray.

programme.title: A Winter's Tale
programme.desc: This program explores the resilience of nature on the shortest day of the year, showcasing wildlife and the insulated human world.

programme.title: Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: With Britain in the grip of winter and facing the coldest temperatures of the year, wildlife must cope with the cold.

programme.title: Spy in the Snow
programme.desc: Behind nature's winter wonderland are some of the toughest places to survive. Hidden cameras in a new generation of Spy Creatures reveal the fascinating behaviors of animals from penguins to parrots, polar bears to otters, wallabies, and wombats.

programme.title: Wild Battlefields
programme.desc: BBC Earth brings you heart-pounding action, mind-blowing sights, and the wonder of this amazing planet we call home on Pluto TV.

programme.title: Snow Animals
programme.desc: Introducing a cast of charismatic animals to reveal the remarkable strategies they use to survive, and even thrive, in winter -- for animals this is the toughest time of year, and preparations start early.

programme.title: Snow Cats and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan joins Dr. Victor Lukarevsky in Russia to attempt to rehabilitate two pairs of lynx held captive for years.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More
programme.desc: Rivalries resurface when a new bad girl enters the house; Kat is dealing with her insecurities and realizes that she needs to figure out what she wants out of the Bad Girls Club.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More
programme.desc: Jela and the twins lose their patience when the other girls decide to hold a séance at the house; Jasmine drowns her sorrows in male attention; Laura, a life coach, tries to give the girls some perspective.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club
programme.desc: Girls with attitude live together in Hollywood.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More
programme.desc: It isn't long before the girls cause drama for the new girl, Alicia; missing her boyfriend, Beatrice sets her sights on Kat; the girls are determined to make Kat's birthday special.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More
programme.desc: Alicia feels like the house may be the wrong place for her; Kat and Beatrice take their relationship to the next level; to relieve tension, the other girls seek solace in some sexual healing.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More
programme.desc: The girls tie up loose ends while away in San Diego; Kat struggles to walk out of the house a changed woman; Laura has her final sessions with the girls.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Redemption
programme.desc: The Bad Girls return to Los Angeles; the Bad Girls' redemption will be put to test when old feuds are re-ignited.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Time has not healed broken hearts for ex-lovers, Diamond and Olivia; Life Coach Laura meets with the cast for the last time and implores them not to hurt one another.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club
programme.desc: Girls with attitude live together in Hollywood.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: When the cast arrives in Los Angeles, they are teamed with their sisters; the twins are treated as outsiders; a pair of sisters cannot stop bickering; a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: The twins can't seem to shake their role as outsiders and are shocked when their roommates attempt to evict them; further investigation into Olivia's medical condition leaves the housemates wondering who they can trust.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: When replacement sisters arrive, the roommates attempt to drive them out with a wild prank that goes too far; Olivia deals with backlash from her big lie; tension between Kristina and Angela comes to a head.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Torn between her ostracized sister and the rest of her roommates, Diamond finds herself on shaky ground in the house; four new girls arrive to stir things up; two of them instantly rub the girls the wrong way.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club
programme.desc: Girls with attitude live together in Hollywood.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Jazmyn and Jaimee stick together against the rest of the house; the lies and violence weigh heavily on Melissa and Allison; a decision is made, sealing Olivia and Diamond's fate; the girls get ratchet after a night of partying.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon challenges the owner of a beer-only bar being undercut by a BYOB liquor policy to harness her redneck ingenuity in order to save her business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Before he can save their failing bar, Jon must navigate the turbulent business partnership between an ex-pilot and his ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must deflate the ego of a Puerto Rican bar owner who berates his staff and sons as his bar sinks further into debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has a hard time getting through to the owner of the Black Light District, who's convinced fixing up his rancid dive would be a betrayal of his punk rock credo.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a near-fatal heart attack, Artie, the owner of Alibi in Las Vegas, lost his zeal for the work, and it's up to Jon to help him get it back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to help the owner of New England's Ale House Grille, a single mom who's become reliant on a rude, incompetent manager since her husband left.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is tasked with getting the apathetic owner of Van Goghz to put down her vape pen and start engaging with customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In order to save a failing Irish pub in Philadelphia, Jon must reinvigorate its owner, who was once a star chef.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his first-ever emergency rescue, Jon uses his last resort to help the overwhelmed and grieving owner of Buffalo City Bar & Grille save her father's legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has to straighten out the abrasive owner of the St8 Pub, who has squandered a generous deal from the landlord and taken advantage of his mother financially.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon faces a real challenge with Cashmere Nightclub in North Carolina, where the wild manager thinks it's OK to sell cheap booze from pricey bottles.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get an overly-emotional bar owner to stop wallowing and take action to save his bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After suffering a stroke, the owner of Desi Romano's Sports Bar & Grill risks losing his family legacy if Jon can't help him bounce back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon schools the clueless owner of Grinders, whose unauthorized and unsafe renovation has the city threatening to shut the place down.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A whitewater rafting trip turns deadly when Mitch, Hobie, Eddie, Shauni and CJ are pursued by the murderous miners that killed Mitch's uncle to get his map leading to the "Golden Boot" that Mitch and the others are now searching for.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Jimmy Slade and Matt Brody tangle with a violent surf gang, while Mitch's life is thrown into turmoil when former lover Stephanie Holden assumes co-command of Baywatch headquarters.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Summer and Matt face grueling personal and physical challenges in Rookie School, the "boot camp” of lifeguarding, while unusual circumstances force female odd couple CJ and Stephanie to share an apartment.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie and Summer each find themselves torn between doing the right thing and giving in to dangerous social pressures.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Malibu Beach High students square off against the administration's plans to sell sacred Chumash Indian lands. And Garner quits the beach to work as a street cop again, only to be stuck in an office job by his vindictive captain.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt's tempestuous affair with a gorgeous motorcycle racer takes him to the brink, while Mitch and Stephanie go head-to-head in a spirited battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A thrilling muscle boat competition is the backdrop for a whirlwind romance between Mitch and a beautiful woman he doesn't know is both a princess and the target of an assassination plot.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Stephanie board a yacht disguised as wealthy southern honeymooners to capture a group of modern-day pirates and find themselves oddly attracted to each other's undercover character.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Garner go undercover as a two-on-two street basketball team to solve a young athlete's murder. CJ becomes involved with an amorous, honeymooning Midwestern tourist.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A rock concert and political rally are the backdrop for a chilling assassination plot that finds CJ unconscious on an explosive-laden Scarab heading for the crowded pier.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A dispute between Mitch's lifeguard career and his father's desire to have him take over the family architecture business becomes intensified by devastating news about the elder Buchannon.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ and Stephanie travel to Catalina Island for a "girls-only” weekend getaway, only to be distracted by two handsome men, leading to a life and death encounter. When Mitch and Hobie hire a gorgeous Swedish au pair, amorous complications ensue.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Stephanie cope with an odd assembly of UFO enthusiasts camping on the beach in anticipation of an extraterrestrial visitation. Smugglers threaten Summer to recover diamonds they hid inside a surfboard Slade gave her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards set sail on a romantic cruise, only to encounter a dangerous fugitive, who forces Mitch and Stephanie overboard into the stormy Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Mohegan Sun Arena as two giants collide in the Bellator cage when all American Matt Mitrione takes on Russian knock-out artist Sergei Kharitonov in the Heavyweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena with a Quarter Final bout in the Welterweight World Gran Prix as undefeated Michael Page takes on Paul Daley. In the Co-Main Event, Mirko Cro Cop makes his Bellator MMA debut against Roy Nelson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Emmanuel Sanchez returns to the cage after his hard-fought run toward the title vs a featherweight rematch Georgi Karakhanyan.

programme.title: Bellator 219: Awad vs Girtz
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Temecula, California with a lightweight clash between Brandon Girtz and Saad Awad that promises fireworks. Also, former welterweight champ Andrey Koreshkov, and former featherweight champ Daniel Straus makes his long-awaited return.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Joes to kick off the Welterweight Grand Prix as Rory MacDonald defeats his Welterweight belt against the veteran Jon Fitch. In the co-main event, Flyweight Champ Ilima Lei Macfarlane faces off against Veta Arteaga.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Douglas Lima takes on Michael 'Venom' Page in the Semi-Final round of the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Main Event, Featherweight Champion Patricio Pitbull moves up to challenge Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Madison Square Garden as Welterweight Champ Rory MacDonald defends his belt against Neiman Gracie in the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Co-Main Event MMA legends Lyoto Machida and Chael Sonnen square off in the Bellator cage.

programme.title: Bellator 224: Budd vs Rubin
programme.desc: The summer heats up when Bellator MMA Featherweight World Champion Julia Budd returns to the cage off 10 straight wins. Can her challenger the undefeated Olga “Big Bad” Rubin ice out Julia’s hot streak? Also, rising star Juliana Velasquez in action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with a stacked card as the Featherweight Grand Prix kicks off with four of the opening round bouts. Then in the Main Event, Ryan Bader defends his Heavyweight belt against MMA legend Chieck Kongo

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After a 4 mo. romance, Sheri married Tim. He told her he was a retired doctor, former professional hockey player, wealthy businessman & Canadian air force pilot. Sheri grew suspicious after 1 month that Tim was cheating, & unraveled a web of lies.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Leah says mom Dora appears sweet but she's actually a narcissist, hypochondriac, drama queen & liar. Can this mother-daughter find common ground and rebuild? Plus Carrie says mom Paula, 61, has been meeting strangers online having sex. Dr. Phil weighs in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the family of Amy, "Mother God", who says she can heal the world with her group, Love Has Won. The family alleges that Amy is a brainwashed "cult leader" and she is putting other people's lives at risk. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A 17-year-old football star accused of rape -- and the alleged victim, a 16-year-old classmate -- speak out about how one alcohol-fueled night changed their lives in an instant. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie is stressed raising 4 children--Brinley, 15, smokes pot, vapes, and runs away, once claiming kidnapping. Cassie's husband, Jonah, with his drug & alcohol abuse, is a danger to her children. Dr. Phil enlists Brinley's help to enlighten the family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gina says her daughter, Alexis, 18, was "kidnapped" and "held hostage" by her survivalist boyfriend, David, 19, which Alexis and David deny. Mom Gina fears for Alexis's safety. David agrees he’s a survivalist who owns guns, but he's not dangerous. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: People, eager to give opinions, can lose an entire career with just one tweet. Kathy won Miss Michigan 2019 but lost the crown the next day because of comments she made on social media.Plus, Carissa's transphobic posts derailed her dreams.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shelby wants to find the truth about her dad's online relationship with a woman he's never met. Dad David says "Maria" has a $10 million inheritance and says he knows for a fact that "Maria" is a real person and he can't wait to introduce her one day.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robert, a retired professor, says he began dating as his 40-year marriage unraveled. Wife Jeremi says Robert spent their $1 million savings on day trading and giving money to women, who she insists are catfish. Dr. Phil finds out what is going on. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer believes she & Russian Pres. Vladimir Putin are in love; the Lord has revealed she will be Putin's wife, the Mother of Russia, & birth him a child. Family syas Jen feels she's intercepted Trump's assassination attemp, terrorist plots, and 4 wars.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil talks to mothers-in-law feuding with their sons-in-law and the relatives caught in the crossfire of these ongoing feuds.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kala Brown made national headlines when she was discovered alive 2 months after disappearng in South Carolina. She was kidnapped, locked in a metal storage container & chained on the neck by a serial killer. Kala speaks about her life in captivity.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ashley was sexually abused by her father from ages of 5 to 18, locked in a small camper, while giving birth to four of her father's children. In her first national interview since her father's arrest, the 22-year-old mom speaks about her horrible ordeal.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Equalizer" star Queen Latifah stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, In A Minute Ross is sharing an all new delicious Rossipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, it's an all-new Cookbook Club with "Half Baked Harvest" author Tieghan Gerard who is whipping up Finish Spicy Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bel-Air" star Jabari Banks is joining Drew to chat about his show. Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he's caught burglarizing property in the area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate driver attempts to flee on foot. Officers investigate a complaint in front of a local convenience store. Officers coordinate a sting designed to apprehend suspects who patronize prostitutes.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing vehicle leads an officer on a hot pursuit, a deputy encounters a nervous driver with a big secret, and a young cyclist tries to make a quick getaway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer chases down a woman escaping on her bike, a stolen car leads to a couple revealing their affairs, and a driver with some odd drinking habits is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Daniela acordó tener sexo con dos chicos con la condición de que se pusieran condón, pero ellos no cumplieron. Jonathan perdió el puente de dientes postizos en una clase de buceo y exige pago.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Carlos grabó a una pareja mientras tenía sexo y subió el video a las redes, lo que captó era una violación. Oscar se queda dormido en un bote, su esposa y su amigo aprovechan para tener sexo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Le dio permiso a una amiga para salir con su hijo de 15 años, ella lo violó. También, Pedro es alérgico a la radiación electromagnética del WiFi, por eso usa un inhibidor.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.desc: Frasier's psychological party game brings unpleasant revelations at his Halloween party. Niles dresses as Martin and gets drunk on beer. The children in the apartment building believe that Frasier eats kids' brains.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: Jesús, nuestro Señor
programme.desc: Ultima parte de la trilogía dedicada a la vida de Jesús, donde se narran vida pública, pasión y muerte.

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: Cometieron dos errores
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood protagoniza esta historia sobre una banda de justicieros que cometen dos errores: ahorcar al hombre equivocado y no terminar el trabajo. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern y Dennis Hopper coprotagonizan este western de acción.

programme.title: Llega un jinete libre y salvaje
programme.desc: En el Viejo Oeste de los años 40, dos ganaderos de poca monta se alían para hacer frente a los estragos de un terrateniente despiadado que pretende ampliar su imperio a cualquier precio. Protagonizada por Jane Fonda, James Caan y Jason Robards.

programme.title: Barreras
programme.desc: Situada en Pittsburgh en los años 50, la adaptación para cine de la obra de August Wilson ganadora de un Pulitzer muestra al exjugador de béisbol Troy Maxson mientras lucha por sustentar a sus seres amados en un mundo que amenaza con derribarlo.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Están todos bien
programme.desc: Cuando los hijos de Frank Goode (Robert DeNiro) cancelan una reunión familiar, el viudo emprende un viaje por el país para reconectarse con ellos. Esperando compartir las alegrías de sus vidas felices, sus visitas revelan una imagen no muy perfecta.

programme.title: Extraordinary Measures (Cbs Films)
programme.desc: La determinación empuja a un padre idealista a unir fuerzas con un investigador médico solitario para encontrar una cura antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Mente indomable
programme.desc: El exitoso drama ganador del Óscar, que lanzó las carreras de Matt Damon y Ben Affleck, cuenta la historia de un genio de clase obrera obstinado a quien no le va bien en la vida, hasta que conoce a un profesor de psicología cercano (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: En nombre del amor
programme.desc: De Nicholas Sparks, el autor best-seller, llega esta conmovedora historia sobre hasta dónde estamos dispuestos a llegar para mantener viva la esperanza del amor.

programme.title: El príncipe y yo
programme.desc: Una fantástica historia de amor sobre una estudiante de medicina que se enamora de un príncipe danés que se negó a seguir las tradiciones de sus padres y vino a EE.UU. a rebelarse.

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: San Andreas Quake
programme.desc: Cuando una desacreditada sismóloga de Los Andeles advierte acerca de un inminente terremoto de 12.7, nadie la toma en serio. Sola, corre desesperadamente para poner a salvo a su familia antes de que el terremoto separe la ciudad del continente.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Bajo Fuego
programme.desc: El Coronel Terry Childers es un patriota y un héroe de guerra. Pero cuando una misión de paz en Yemen liderada por él resulta mal, termina enfrentando una corte marcial.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.desc: El Coronel Terry Childers es un patriota y un héroe de guerra. Pero cuando una misión de paz en Yemen liderada por él resulta mal, termina enfrentando una corte marcial.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2

programme.desc: Una escritora de romances, famosa por sus obras ambientadas en navidad, queda varada por la nieve en Cranberry Falls, donde queda involucrada en un triángulo amoroso entre un amor de su niñez y el periodista que busca entrevistarla.

programme.title: Un novio para Navidad
programme.desc: Cuando el plan de Ashley de reconectar con un exnovio en Navidad fracasa, su mejor amigo Liam y ella deciden fingir un romance. Mientras que sus sentimientos comienzan a volverse reales, Ashley tendrá que decidir lo que su corazón en verdad quiere.

programme.title: Los 12 perros de Navidad
programme.desc: Un padre viudo y desempleado envía a regañadientes a su hija a permanecer con su tía en una ciudad que ha prohibido los perros. En el camino a la escuela un día encuentra un perrito y decide quedárselo.

programme.title: Una propuesta navideña
programme.desc: Una chef desafortunada que sueña con iniciar su propia línea de restaurantes sobre ruedas, se hace pasar por la novia de un prominente abogado de Seattle que visita a su familia por Navidad.

programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: Cementerio de mascotas
programme.desc: Para la mayoría de las familias, una mudanza es un nuevo comienzo. Pero para los Creeds será el inicio del fin. Se han mudado al lado del lugar que los niños construyen con sus sueños rotos, el Cementerio de mascotas.

programme.desc: On February 2, 2010, two masked gunmen commit a violent robbery and shoot Michael Temple Jr., rendering him a quadriplegic for five years before his death. In this unusual cold case, DNA is used to create a sketch of the killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a 30-year-old mother fails to report for duty in Virginia, the Army lists her as AWOL. Her family immediately suspects foul play. They embark on a 13-year quest for answers before an eyewitness blows the case wide open.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts--and three other cold case murders--leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A look at the case of James Allen Selby, a serial rapist who eluded police for years while attacking 11 women in five states - Oklahoma, Nevada, California, Arizona, and Colorado.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A murderer's saliva, found on envelopes, helps seal his doom 37 years after his first killing. And Colorado police crack a cold case 24 years later when they take a DNA sample from the victim's son that proves that his father murdered his mother.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: We follow Det. Vince Velazquez of Atlanta and Capt. Russell Popham of East Point, Ga., as they work to solve the 1995 rape and murder of 14-year-old Nacole Smith, one of Atlanta's most notorious unsolved crimes.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The body of Lori Nesson is found in a ditch in 1974, yet her death is not ruled a homicide. After four decades, the cause of death is changed to homicide, and the search begins for a killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In 1989, socialite Susan Doll was found beaten, raped, and strangled in Colorado.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: College student Brad Perry shows up to work his graveyard shift at the gas station and is never seen alive again.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: 13 days after Pam Pitts disappears in 1988 her charred body is found at a popular hangout spot in the Arizona desert. When a second victim is discovered in a mineshaft, detectives suspect the killer may have known them both.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A police investigator discovers a letter written 16 years earlier that provides clues to a woman's murder. And a firearms expert supplies the evidence that South Carolina authorities need to put a man on trial in 2002 for a murder committed in 1961.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In Portland, Maine a housewife disappears. One year later her body is unearthed in the cellar. I.R. unravels this cold case investigation from the inside out. With the help of science, police are able to uncover a blueprint of the crime.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These girls got on the wrong path and are convinced that their mothers don't deserve their respect. Some have had babies and are ready to have more. But MAURY and his team of experts are here to try and set these girls back on the right track.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It's more stories of paternity mysteries, mad moms and denying dads. These women are desperate for the paternity search to end. But after the results are revealed, will they be jumping for joy? Or will they have to start their search all over again?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After taking 5 DNA tests, Rebecca is back with 2 more men to find the father of her new baby! Then, Don and his wife were happy to find out that their son didn’t father Jessica’s baby, but they’re back because she thinks Don is the dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last time they were on MAURY, Leslie proved that Daniel was her baby's father. Now they're back to deny that Daniel fathered his ex-girlfriend Dina's son. Then, Glenn denies that he's the feather of his ex's daughter and his own wife's son!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Waldo refuses to believe that he fathered Chelsea’s baby because of her pale complexion. Then, Kianna found pics of naked women in Nick’s phone and condoms and cologne in his gym bag. What will Maury’s lie detector results say?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Cheaters, cheaters and more cheaters! Today’s MAURY is full of drama, shock and temptation. These guests simply can’t keep their hands to themselves when faced with a tempting situation and find themselves in deep trouble with their partners!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Charisse thinks her fiancé Deon cheated with her best friend Shante. Then Jessica believes her child's dad Ronald slept with her cousin. Jennifer wants a lie detector test to find out if her boyfriend had sex with another women.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jay claims he's not the father of Tanelle's babies. Jennifer says that Thomas is the father, but he's engaged to her cousin and says she's got it wrong. Plus, Josh doubts that he's fathered Angela's twins. But could he have fathered only one twin?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tu'Shaun cheat on Nette with her sisters? Sister Bobbie has a shocking confession that could threaten both Nette's relationship with her man and both of her sisters! Then, triplet Alisha fears that her husband is sleeping with her 2 sisters!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The Paternity drama explodes on today's MAURY! Could one woman's twins really have 2 different fathers? It's a one in a million DNA shot, but one that we have seen before on our show. Plus more wild DNA results on today's MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shenik and Shenequa were united on Maury’s show last year after a DNA test. But now is Shenik sleeping with her sister’s man? Plus, the only thing that stands in the way of these couples tying the knot are their lie detector test results!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Denese and her mom return because they know Dejon fathered Denese's daughter! Plus, Rebecca has been on 6 times for 7 DNA tests and returns for her 8th and 9th tests! Will any of these men be her kids' fathers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After months of begging and pleading, Latoya forgave Justice for cheating. But now they’re back to test him for the same thing! Then, James could be too good to be true – is he cheating on Santa? What will the lie detector tests say?

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Faruk le propone matrimonio a Süreyya. Esma invita a İpek y a sus padres a cerrar el asunto de la boda. Faruk sorprende a todo el mundo cuando se presenta con Süreyya.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Después de la vergonzosa noche en la mansión, Esma le promete a İpek que se casará con Faruk de cualquier manera.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Tras el desastroso matrimonio, toda la familia regresa a la hacienda.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Faruk y Süreyya en una fuerte pelea. Esma descubre el pastel que Nurgül cocinó para el cumpleaños de Fikret y la humilla por hacerlo.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Esma prepara un acuerdo de divorcio para Faruk y Süreyya y le pide al abogado que hable con Süreyya, al parecer de parte de Faruk.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un choque mortal en 1983 causado por el equipo de seguridad de la reina de Inglaterra durante una visita a California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Shamaia Smith desaparece de un club de striptease en East Hartford, Connecticut. La policía considera varios patrones del club, pero se enfocan en un comerciante local, Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un guardia de seguridad desapareció de su puesto sin dejar rastro. Sus restos fueron encontrados un año después en un campamento lejano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesinato en el menú
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de cocina de un restaurante histórico de Filadelfia fue encontrado muerto, los investigadores entrevistaron a los sospechosos habituales: familiares, amigos y compañeros de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuarto Frío
programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores del hospital no pudieron determinar la causa de las alucinaciones y el intenso dolor de Bobby Curley. Lo trataron como un trastorno neurológico pero su estado se deterioró. Él estaba siendo envenenado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante siete años, un trío de hombres robó un banco tras otro. Siempre se escapaban antes de que llegara la policía y no dejaban pruebas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un joven bombero murió de lo que parecía ser una enfermedad cardíaca grave pero no diagnosticada, su familia y amigos quedaron devastados, pero no tenían pruebas de algún juego sucio.
