programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie’s retail therapy goes awry when Marco finds his credit card maxed out. Ellie rescues him this time, but Marco realizes a new job is the real solution—and might even give him the opportunity to meet new people.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny and Jay’s faux-mance is working perfectly. But when Jay gets too serious, Manny reminds him it's all fake.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Manny discovers that her University demo reel is actually a sex tape that she and Jay made, her future hangs in the balance. By the time Jay catches up to her with the correct DVD, it's too late.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s finally been granted a spot on Spirit Squad, and she’s ecstatic. But trying to be a normal teenager is proving a difficult balancing act.

programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Nigel Marven visits Santa Maria, the world's tallest coastal mountain, which is home to many creatures found nowhere else on Earth.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Nigel Marven explores Colombia's Pacific coast, which is home to giant geckos, glowing beetles and some bright and vividly coloured frogs.

programme.title: Wild Memoirs of a Film Crew
programme.desc: In this episode, the film crew and presenters reflect on heart-stopping wild encounters.

programme.title: Wild Memoirs of a Film Crew
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew witness unbelievable athleticism as a lioness tackles an impala in midair. The crew share rhino incidents that were probably a bit too close for comfort. Startling encounters pursue with elephants that will never be forgotten.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Bred from wolves, Huskies have helped humans carve out an existence in Alaska's desolate wilderness. These dogs still maintain many physical adaptations of their wild ancestors, enabling them to withstand the fierce conditions of the Alaskan winter.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: There are more Caribou in Alaska than people! Across the Arctic, they're the lifeblood of many remote communities. But human expansion, and wild predators, have led to their rapid decline.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: One of Alaska's most secretive and efficient predators, Lynx are usually highly elusive… but in Anchorage, houses are being built in the Lynx's territory, forcing these usually shy big cats, to find new ways to survive on the streets.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: In Anchorage, one bird rules the roost…the Bald Eagle. Expert hunters are perfectly adapted to life in tough arctic conditions, but in Anchorage, the secret to their survival… is trash.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: For years, at least four highly elusive wolf packs have lived and hunted on the edge of the wild city of Anchorage. But as the city spreads further and further into wolf country, the wolves are now getting bolder.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to hundreds of black bears. And it's these black bears, that are patrolling the city. With their brains, their brawn and their cunning, these bears have mastered life in this urban jungle.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage has a rather unique resident who is renowned as nature's lumberjack and North America's largest rodent, the beaver. With their powerful teeth, the trees they fell can be huge, and their dams can be seen from space.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to a huge number of wild porcupines, living in the city's parks, gardens, and streets. Almost twice the average size, Anchorage's porcupines search for food here in the city, and find refuge during the bitter Alaskan winters.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Travelling an incredible, 3500 miles through rivers and streams, salmon are Alaska's hardiest resident. But there is one grizzly hazard they face right at the end of their journey. It's the brown bears.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This unique arctic city is home to over 2000 moose! And these notorious animals are running riot… Crossing busy highways, giving birth in backyards, and even doing battle, right here in suburbia!

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This city spends most of the year encased in ice…but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, working faster to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Alaska, one of the last true wildernesses on earth. With 600 square miles of pristine habitat, this state is home to an abundance of wildlife. Herds of caribou roam the plains, wolves stalk in the forest and the brown bears are the kings of the rivers.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This city spends most of the year encased in ice…but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, working faster to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda show Lyndal and Bruce around the new building site, they explain their plans for the lodge building while admiring the wildlife and views.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Lyndal and Amanda meet some baboons and their babies alongside the road on the way to see the famous Baobab tree, once there they see and buy some local word statues/carvings.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Bruce is still working on the meat from the cow's head meat, making biltong from pieces and hanging it up, and the rest gets put into the stew.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Moving the leadwood tree is proving to be nerve-wracking for Amanda, it isn't the heaviest tree for nothing.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Ant is now living on site and explains why it is easier and safer for him to be there, he starts his day by walking around the building site and checking that everything is ok.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: The incorrect floor nails are sent from SA, Ant goes to town to get some, but finds out the small bag comes at quite a price!

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Bruce arrives back from the US and Amanda shows him around the lodge and the progress that has been made…and then the rains come.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: José se niega a llevar a Amalia al altar, alegando que no cree en el matrimonio. Ella se lo pide a Reinaldo, luego de sufrir el rechazo de su padre. Juan Pablo, ablandado por Victoria, besa a Esther. José y Teresa Cristina tendrán una noche romántica.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina irrumpe en el Rey Gourmet cuando Rafael y Amalia celebraban su compromiso con una cena preparada por Reinaldo. El personal del restaurante se junta y la echan. Beatriz llega a casa de Esther y la amenaza con un cuchillo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo discute con Teresa Cristina, no quiere que Patricia viva un día más con ella. Teresa Cristina busca un arma y lo amenaza, forcejean y Reinaldo sale herido. Iris le aconseja a su sobrina que se vaya por un tiempo mientras todo se enfría.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa Luján es una joven madre, valiente y emprendedora. Víctor la enamora y la deja sola con su hijo Lalo. Con mucho esfuerzo sale adelante como administradora de un pequeño hotel en Michoacán, hasta que regresa Miguelito, el narco del pueblo.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: La violencia se adueña de Michoacán y Marisa se ve obligada a huir con su hijo. Lalo quiere que se case con Víctor para tener estatus legal en EE. UU., pero Marisa sabe que el amor no se compra. En Nueva York, Cristóbal intenta desenmascarar a Ronnie.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal consigue la prueba que buscaba en la construcción, pero se lo llevan preso. Marisa no quiere perder más tiempo y se va con Lalo a Nueva York en busca del sueño americano. En la gran manzana, se dan cuenta que su hijo es un niño especial.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal Parker resulta ser un acucioso empresario que le gusta indagar en sus negocios. Marisa está casi en la quiebra, hasta que se convierte en una empleada en Manhattan. Por un accidente del destino y una confusión, conoce al príncipe de sus sueños.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta le hace la guerra a Alicia para que no consiga ni posada, ni comida. Laurentino prepara una estocada final, como abogado de la familia Blanco quiere que ella se vaya del pueblo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia despierta de una de sus pesadillas, quiere irse de la casa de Justino Briñón, le teme al misterio que lo envuelve, pero a él le interesa retenerla. Hayde muestra desacuerdo con su madre.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no quiere compromisos y así se lo hace saber a la mujer con la que comparte, le dice a su madre que ha tomado una decisión. Justino le pregunta a Alicia cómo era su vida con Amador.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta cree que su exnuera ya no está en el pueblo, pero le preocupa que Sebastián no cambie de opinión. Justino sabe que es el momento de la revancha, le da órdenes precisas a Alicia.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: La doctora Alba da su versión de los hechos a la prensa y luego Beatriz cuenta su verdad. Esther ve en las noticias la rueda de prensa, llama a Gabriel y le dice que volverá a pelear por Victoria. Todos se preguntan cómo se resolverá este caso.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: José se niega a llevar a Amalia al altar, alegando que no cree en el matrimonio. Ella se lo pide a Reinaldo, luego de sufrir el rechazo de su padre. Juan Pablo, ablandado por Victoria, besa a Esther. José y Teresa Cristina tendrán una noche romántica.

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Breakfast Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by Craig Carton, Mark Schlereth, and Danny Parkins, Breakfast Ball is a fun and lively morning show discussing the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: The Facility
programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.desc: Contestants are harnessed and locked into a computer ratchet system. Couples will make their way through junkyard obstacles, retrieving hubcaps. The male contestants will be standing on top of a bus while their female partners are strapped under the bus.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are strapped to a line on the deck, with their bungees attached to a helicopter. Contestants will cut their way through two separate ropes. Contestants are connected to a helicopter and must repel down.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars as they are flown underneath the belly of a helicopter, eat bees, are launched off a building through glass, deal with the horror of bull testicles and drive a car through the back of a moving semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Five teams of 2 are bungied off a cliff, must eat leeches, must run through a burning building, deal with the Wheel of Misfortune, and finally grab flags off a moving car while dangling of a crane. All is the hopes of winning $100,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four couples compete for $50,000. In order to win they must face getting catapulted off the top of a tall building, transfer snakes with theirs mouths and transfers flags to a partner hanging under a helicopter, all while riding a personal watercraft.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk, eat a disgusting meal consisting of roaches, grasshoppers, blood salsa and maggots and lastly must leap back and forth from a moving station wagon onto a bus.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other. They must launch their car into a lake, dive for cow hearts in gallons of blood, and run, fly, swim and climb while trying to blow up a fueling station.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000. They face three extreme stunts as they are stuck in a car being flown under two helicopters, must drink a Fear Factor Crappacino and lastly are dropped through a collapsing tower.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition while in the back of a truck, must devour nasty scorpions, and are strapped to the front of a cement truck as it smashes through structures.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will hang from a bar placed outside a 12th story window and drop by a descender line . Each contestant will be asked to eat three sheep's eyes in three minutes. Each contestant is lowered by their feet head first into a water tank.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will fire a starter's pistol and run from an attack dog. The contestants will lie in a pit made up of faux rocks and burlap. A 6 and a half inch wide beam is suspended over 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant stands on top of a moving semi truck jump and leaps. Approximately 300,000 superworms will be placed into the case with the contestants. Each contestant will be holding a paint ball gun and harnessed to a reverse bungee line.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will be asked to eat two boiled buffalo testicles in 4 minutes. Each contestant will be harnessed and raised by crane. Each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is lowered by crane to the same depth of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will be dragged behind a horse. Contestant will enter a elevator shaft and will be covered by approximately 400 rats. One at a time each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is raised by crane over 100 feet in the air.

programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.desc: TAPS is joined by Jason's daughter, Haily, on two cases; The Shanley Hotel in Napanoch, New York and Old Fort Niagara, in Youngstown, New York. Both cases involve a gruesome death that took place at a well, instigating paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain
programme.desc: On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Distillery of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Buffalo Trace Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky to investigate hauntings at the oldest operating distillery in America.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget (Classic)

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Super Show
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assaulted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad, and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Super Show
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Super Show
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Super Show
programme.desc: In Victoria, Mario, and Luigi are riding atop a carriage being pulled by a horse traveling down a street in search of a great detective by the name of Herlock Solmes, with Toad and Princess Toadstool riding in the carriage.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Super Show: Caught in a Draft/ Bad Rap
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have arrived in Rap Land, because King Koopa had kidnapped Rap Land's king, and is attempting to take everyone's money by playing an eerie theme throughout the land.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Super Show
programme.desc: To help Toad pay off his debt to Fry Guy, Mario, and Luigi enter a bike race in hopes of collecting the prize money. But what they don't know is that it's all a trap planned by Koopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Super Show

programme.desc: The 'KoopaDoopaRaiserUpper' device sends the Mushroom Kingdom up into the clouds./Koopa and his Koopalings invade the real world in the Doom Ship, sealing all the warp pipes.

programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./ Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil host the perfect New Year's party. They celebrate with a champagne ice sculpture and a feast to enliven the taste buds.

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas 2015
programme.desc: Kirstie goes to Switzerland for some festive ideas - including a show-stopping garland and boozy fondue. There are also ideas for gifts, crafts, a Christmas cake, and some tips on decorating the tree.

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas 2015
programme.desc: Kirstie is making a few of her favorite things - like warm woolen mittens, mulled wine, and baked treats for the tree. There are also gingerbread houses.

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas 2015

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas 2016

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas 2016
programme.desc: Kirstie heads to the Waddesdon Manor Christmas Fair in Buckinghamshire, visiting countless Christmas stalls with thousands of homemade culinary delights and handcrafted seasonal gifts.

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas 2016
programme.desc: Kirstie heads to London to experience Columbia Road's Christmas night market in Hoxton, featuring mulled wine, carols, and 'urban chic' sensibilities. The event also plays host to an array of shops selling hand-made gifts and goodies.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's 12 Tastes of Christmas

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Christmas Special 2011
programme.desc: Nigel Slater presents a nostalgic celebration of well-loved Christmas dishes, past and present. Simple dishes, from a sea bass starter to a roast duck feast and a dazzling party trifle.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Christmas Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel reminisces about how his family stocked up for the period between Christmas and New Year. He reinvents some of his childhood favourites, and looks at which vegetables are available in winter.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Christmas Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel designs a week's worth of food for the post-Christmas detox that is healthy and balanced but not bland and boring.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After watching two women walk out of a local dress shop with $200 in purchases, Lucy and Ethel decide to buy the shop and go into business for themselves. The first signs of trouble begin when they can't agree on a name for their store.

programme.desc: The annual talent show for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League is going to be televised this year, and Lucy and Ethel are going to perform a duet. Everything is going well as Lucy gets Ricky to emcee the show and help her and Ethel prepare.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: treated as if they were men. Later on, when the two couples go out to dinner, Fred and Ricky follow the ladies' instructions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #21: The Last Job

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata concocts an extravagant plan to finally capture Lupin by luring him in with a fake meteor made from 6 tons of pure gold. Low and behold, his plan backfires and Lupin and his gang make off with the meteor.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin sneaks into an old castle to steal a collection of priceless angel paintings, owned by the late Malcolm Hurst. Inside the castle, Lupin meets a mysterious girl named Flora, who knows the whereabouts of the angel paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are out at sea attempting to retrieve the gold inside a sunken pirate ship. However, a female pirate gang interrupts their retrieval mission and both parties leave empty-handed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Fujiko had once betrayed her heist partner Garb, known as the Grim Reaper, and left him for dead. Garb, who has seemingly returned from the dead, is determined to kill Fujiko and has an uncanny ability to dodge bullets with ease.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex en la villa, que no le cae muy bien a todos, pero parece que habrá una reconciliación. Norma está celosa por Sargento y Renata. En la fiesta de togas, Montse y Ernesto coquetean. Sargento se altera y casi llega a los golpes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el quinto ex a la villa y es una gran sorpresa para varios. Spencer se va de cita y cree encontrar el amor. Rocío muestra que su venganza va en serio y coquetea con Ernesto y Oscar. Una maldición parece romperse en la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a reconquistar a su antigua pareja. Renata y Sargento van en serio, mientras que Rocío y Alejandro resuelven sus problemas por un rato. Ernesto sigue tratando de conquistar a Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega otro ex y causa una revolución en la villa. Ernesto le pide a Montse que sea sincera con él y lo respete. Dianey y Elías se van de cita y le rompen el corazón a Spencer, quien encuentra consuelo muy rápido en Norma.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex que causa celos. Renata llora por Sargento, y Rocío discute otra vez con Alejandro y sobrepasa sus límites. Hay una votación sorpresa y una decisión que deja a todos en shock. Ernesto quiere dar el siguiente paso con Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.desc: Still sore, David keeps James out of a deal with a mystery client; Josh Flagg tries to unload a teardown property; Josh Altman strives to win over a new client while enduring pressure from his visiting parents to have children.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Not knowing when, where, or how a dangerous adversary will strike, Jim Phelps and Cinnamon use themselves as human quarries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With Phelps and Rollin as the leading men, the Impossible Missions Force stages an anti-American play which could prove to be a strong propaganda device for the enemy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about how people make peanut butter. Lady Aberlin agrees to take care of Daphne. Henrietta Pussycat suggests making a daycare center at the factory, and Corney agrees.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets Natasha, a famous oboeist. She shows pictures of her children and says she expresses her feelings for them through her music. Prince Tuesday is considering getting sick so that his parents will stay home from work.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett invites Mister Rogers outside for some exercises. Bruce Franco carries a collection of balloon scuptures he has made for the party. He gives Mister Rogers a balloon sculpture that looks like the Neighborhood Trolley.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a week of programs about the environment. He shows how things can be reused. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, there's a real-life problem -- too much garbage -- and the neighbors are trying to find a solution.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bandage on his left hand. He pulls back the bandage to show that his hand is still there. Ana scraped her paw but does not want a bandage. Lady Aberlin is able to convince her otherwise.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make adhesive bandages. Prince Tuesday is looking for someone to play with but all of his friends are busy. At the suggestion of King Friday, he pretends that his rag doll has come to life.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of wolves "singing," and wolf expert Kent Weber stops by with two wolves and explains that wolves are shy, not big and bad like in the fairy tales, and how they live together in families.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folksinger Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers with her ukulele and shares songs her father enjoyed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Yo-Yo Ma describes how he misses his family when he is gone and plays Bach's Sarabande on his cello. Sitting at the piano, Yo-Yo's son Nicholas plays the Skater's Waltz as a duet with his father.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men. After hearing the sound effect from the laughing box, Lady Aberlin sees how long neighbors take to laugh. Eric Kloss makes different sounds using a wind synthesizer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays with different-sized cardboard tubes. Lady Aberlin is observing how neighbors react to the laughter box. Dr. Maggie Kimmel tells the story of “Button Broth.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Freiburger and Finnegan clean out wheels that have been stashed in the garage for far too long by slapping them on a neglected '66 Dodge D100 Utiline truck; they hit the road on a quest to find the perfect 440 for it.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Freiburger scrounges his parts pile to put together a killer 350 V8 while Finnegan and David Newbern add some power upgrades to the mini.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David Freiburger scores a 1965 Ford F-250 4x4 like one he used to own and comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Steve Dulcich had big dreams for his 1968 Plymouth Barracuda before it burned to the ground in the California wildfires; Dulcich was devastated, and his buddy David Freiburger decided they needed to make the car live again.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David Freiburger and Steve Dulcich demonstrate how to get big-block power for cheap by choosing a non-mainstream engine.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Steve Dulcich and David Freiburger put 650 horsepower from a Ford Cleveland engine in a Jeep Commando, starting the Clevo Commando project.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.desc: It's not the size of the car that matters, it's how it's driven; Cotten and Newbern drastically improve the power-to-weight ratio of a teeny '72 Honda Z600 coupe in an attempt to set a record at MidPond Raceway.

programme.title: The Unbearable Weight of Massive Talent
programme.desc: Facing financial ruin, actor Nick Cage accepts $1 million to attend a wealthy fan's birthday party. Taking on the role of a lifetime, he soon finds himself channeling his most iconic and beloved characters to save himself and his loved ones.

programme.title: A Better Life
programme.desc: An illegal immigrant struggles to give his teenage son a better life by working as a gardener in Los Angeles. He soon does whatever it takes to move out of the city and get his boy away from dangerous gangs.

programme.title: Touchback
programme.desc: A man (Brian Presley) seeks counsel from his longtime mentor (Kurt Russell) when he gets a unique opportunity to revisit his youth and the injury that ended his promising football career.

programme.title: The Ride
programme.desc: Released from juvenile detention, a troubled teen enters the world of extreme BMX bike riding with help from his foster father.

programme.title: The Road
programme.desc: A father (Viggo Mortensen) and his son (Kodi Smit-McPhee) try to keep the dream of civilization alive as they wander through a post-apocalyptic landscape.

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: A post-apocalyptic ice age forces humanity's last survivors aboard a globe-spanning supertrain. One man (Chris Evans) will risk everything to lead a revolt for control of the engine and the future of the world.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot (Jake Gyllenhaal) takes part in a secret government program that enables him to assume someone's identity and experience the last few minutes of that person's life.

programme.title: 24 Hour Party People
programme.desc: Graphically depicting the music and dance heritage of Manchester from the late 70s to the early 90s, the movie documents the vibrancy that made Manchester the place in the world that you would most like to be.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin, and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: UHF
programme.desc: The manager of a small-time UHF station which has the lowest ratings in the country inadvertently hits it big with his strange programming ideas to keep Channel 62 from going down the tubes.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: From the Jules Verne classic, a hi-tech drilling rig must rescue a research team trapped deep below the Earth's surface. There they discover an exotic world -- rich with spectacular flora and fantastical creatures.

programme.title: Bad Ass
programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran who becomes a local hero after saving a man from attackers on a city bus decides to take action when his best friend is murdered and the police show little interest in solving the crime.

programme.title: The Silence of the Lambs
programme.desc: An FBI trainee is assigned by her superior to interview an imprisoned, cannibalistic psychopath, Hannibal the Cannibal Lecter, in the hope that he may help uncover the identity of an elusive serial killer.

programme.title: Blade of the Immortal
programme.desc: Manji, a highly skilled samurai, becomes cursed with immortality after a legendary battle. Haunted by the brutal murder of his sister, Manji knows that only fighting evil will regain his soul. The 100th film by master director TAKASHI MIIKE.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor llega con un biciclo antiguo que pone a Rick a rodar: ¿decidirá que este trato vale la pena o le dará la vuelta? A Chum le toca el lado filoso del trato en el momento en que le vende una katana japonesa a Dana White, el presidente de la UFC.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick y Corey están inspirados con un discurso firmado por Martin Luther King. ¿Se unirán a la causa adquiriéndolo o se quedarán sin participar? Rick y Chum quieren un barco a control remoto, la versión miniatura del Crucero de la Selva de Disney.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick intenta conseguir una tarjeta autografiada del presidente Abraham Lincoln que no imagina no tener. Corey y Chum piensan en ofrecer mucho dinero por el mango de un driver de golf diseñado para el presidente Bill Clinton.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Los expertos del empeño empiezan el episodio explosivamente cuando dos pistolas de retrocarga del siglo XVIII llegan a la tienda.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick mataría por tener un sombrero y una pistola que pertenecían a uno de los hombres de los que se sospechaba que era Jack el Destripador. Corey trabaja horas extra para adquirir un reloj de 1920.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: Simulacros de liberación
programme.desc: Después de soportar una crisis económica de diez años, los peligros del cambio climático y la inestabilidad del gobierno, los puertorriqueños organizaron centros comunitarios, marcando su camino hacia la liberación.

programme.title: Overbooking
programme.desc: Lo que alguna vez fue la "Isla de la Calma" está ahora al borde del colapso. Empiezan a sonar múltiples alarmas. ¿Es sostenible este modelo turístico? ¿Podría convertirse Mallorca en un referente para tantos otros lugares que sufren el mismo problema?

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Era la Edad Oscura ... y desde el frío Mar del Norte explotó una civilización marítima que asaltó y aterrorizó a Europa ... eran los Vikingos. Ellos son responsables de crear una vasta red comercial.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: China es una de las civilizaciones más antiguas del mundo y tiene uno de los relatos históricos mejor documentados que existen. Así como una de las estructuras más conocidas e intrigantes del mundo: La Gran Muralla China.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Civilizaciones perdidas, naufragios, criaturas marinas y tesoros hundidos... nuestros océanos ofrecen un mundo oculto de secretos por descubrir.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Alejandro Magno, Cleopatra, reina de Egipto, Vlad III Dracul, príncipe de Rumania, el legado de estos iconos históricos vive en nuestra cultura moderna, pero las misteriosas circunstancias que rodean su muerte.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: La arquitectura antigua se erige como un testimonio duradero del logro humano. Los arqueólogos estudian la arquitectura del pasado para revelar pistas sobre las civilizaciones antiguas que los crearon

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: La inexplicable aparición de formas geométricas en varios lugares alrededor del planeta ha desconcertado a arqueólogos, científicos e investigadores. Estos diseños desconcertantes forman figuras misteriosas.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Desde que tenemos registro del tiempo, los humanos han tratado de comprender los complejos ecosistemas en los que prosperamos y sobrevivimos. También la forma en que estos han evolucionado.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: A pesar de su nombre, la Edad de Bronce se considera una edad de oro de la civilización: un período de casi dos mil años de avances sociales y tecnológicos en armamento y herramientas, cultura y sociedad.

programme.title: Simulacros de liberación
programme.desc: Después de soportar una crisis económica de diez años, los peligros del cambio climático y la inestabilidad del gobierno, los puertorriqueños organizaron centros comunitarios, marcando su camino hacia la liberación.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Springfield, estado de Illinois, el Lake Club es un monumento a una época pasada: un salón de baile donde multitud de personas alguna vez prosperaron, acompañados de los sonidos del jazz clásico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los espiritistas algunas veces hablan sobre cierta región de la existencia donde los espíritus vagan libres de cuerpos materiales, y ellos la llaman “la otra vida”. En las costas de West Bay Lake, estado de Wisconsin.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La ciencia moderna nos afirma que, en el nivel más simple, el mundo material no es más que energía y que todos estamos conectados de forma física con el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Deb y Tony acaban de comenzar su vida juntos. Con su primer hijo en camino, la pareja trabajadora se muda a una pintoresca casa en Atchison, en el estado de Kansas, con muchas esperanzas para el futuro.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la Biblia se relata una historia en la cual Jesús y sus discípulos un día se toparon con un paria que se encontraba poseído. Cuando Jesús le preguntó a ese hombre cómo se llamaba, este le respondió que, dentro de él.

programme.title: Descubrir: Episodio 12: Ecuador
programme.desc: Descubrir transporta al espectador a los destinos más famosos y por las rutas menos transitadas, donde uno puede sentirse un verdadero viajero, disfrutando de paisajes diferentes, conociendo otras gentes y mucho más

programme.title: Descubrir: Episodio 13: La Amazonía Ecuatoriana
programme.desc: Descubrir transporta al espectador a los destinos más famosos y por las rutas menos transitadas, donde uno puede sentirse un verdadero viajero, disfrutando de paisajes diferentes, conociendo otras gentes y mucho más

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Esta historia descubre el fascinante mundo de los escarabajos de estiércol y sus incansables esfuerzos como algunos de los trabajadores más duros de la naturaleza.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre: Conoce los suricatos
programme.desc: Este documental se desarrolla en el poderoso desierto de Kalahari de Sudáfrica. Sigue a una familia de suricatas gregarias por un día, dirigida por una hembra dominante.

programme.title: Infierno árabe
programme.desc: A veces parece que los mamíferos gobiernan el mundo; Hay más de 5.000 especies que colonizan todos los rincones del mundo. Pero en Arabia hay una historia diferente: esta es una tierra donde gobiernan los reptiles.

programme.title: Infierno árabe
programme.desc: El desierto de Arabia es uno de los lugares más desafiantes de la tierra, pero los animales aquí son resistentes y especializados. Las criaturas deben aprovechar todas las oportunidades para encontrar comida, refugio y agua.

programme.title: Infierno árabe
programme.desc: Un Uadi es un pozo de agua, un lugar raro en el desierto donde el lecho de roca dura atrapa las huellas más pequeñas de agua. Todos los animales deben venir a beber, algo que los depredadores aprovechan rápidamente.

programme.title: Infierno árabe
programme.desc: La Península Arábiga es el centro de tránsito mundial para 3 millones de aves en migración hacia y desde Europa, África y Asia. Aquí están las majestuosas aves rapaces y aves zancudas, cómo vuelan, cazan y sobreviven.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Viaje Cicladas del norte, donde las callejuelas cuidadosamente pavimentadas, los molinos de viento, los palomares, los olivares y las playas están bañados por la luz del sol, lo que lo convierte en un destino de ensueño.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué tipo de barbacoa reina en la ciudad de Kansas, Houston o Carolina del Norte? Tony viaja a las tres ciudades para probar por sí mismo los secretos que esconden las salsas, los huesos de madera y los fumadores lentos.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony emprende un peregrinaje a Sídney, Australia, para disfrutar de una comida preparada por uno de los mejores chefs del mundo: Tetsuya Wakuda.

programme.desc: Melbourne, Australia, tiene amantes de la comida fuertes, amables y excéntricos: la clase de gente de Tony. Buscando a los proscritos de la comida.
