programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Roger has been sleeping with his girlfriend's mother and her aunt too. Next Jeff brought the Springer Cam along to help him bust his wife, Dee Dee. Later Brenda is here to tell her lover's wife that she's about to lose her husband!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: A man admits to his wife that he slept with her best friend; a guest is furious with his cousin for telling his girlfriend about his infidelity; a woman wants to know whether her man has been cheating.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Fred deceived his lover Jay, so now Jay wants his just desserts! Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda is about to drive his girlfriend away! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating the same man, Chango, for 6 years! Next Mark's ex-girlfriend wants him back and even lied to him and told him she was pregnant. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeanette witnessed her husband John kissing a man named Russell, who was living with them, but John claims that Russell was trying to homewreck. Then Vanessa is desperate to put an end to her boyfriend Robert's constant accusations of cheating.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Once a celebrated boxer and devoted father, Don's life spiraled into addiction, destroying his family. With a final ultimatum, Steve offers guidance, but the path to change lies solely with Don.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Roxanne and Andrew have 2 kids together. Andrew says he's worried she's been cheating on him and doesn't know if the kids are his! Can Steve's test results save their relationship?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Valerie is fed up with her controlling boyfriend Chris. She says he treats her like a prisoner, but he suspects she's cheating! Then, Amanda is in a bad relationship with Joseph. He believes that Amanda cheated and denies fathering her kids!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he's always staying out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn't want Earnie's ex Tenyia to stay with them just because she's the mother of his child. Is he also cheating on her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Damon confesses to his girlfriend Shanice that he's been cheating on her with 2 women and has a kid with Danielle who wants him to sign over his parental rights! Monica is scared that her fiancée Cedric is unfaithful. Can he prove her wrong?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Robin is trapped living in a nightmare with her fiancé Alfredo. She says he treats her like a slave: ordering her to cook, clean, and other demands. Alfredo doesn't deny it, but says it's his right as a man!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lainie y Justin tienen un bebé de 9 meses juntos. Justin lastima a Lainie porque cree que ella es infiel. ¿Pero cómo reaccionará Steve cuando se enfrente a Justin?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sherry fue atacada a los 15 años y se escapó de su casa. Quiere que Steve la ayude a reunirse con su madre. Después, la hija adolescente de Dawn, Cathy, dio a luz recientemente, pero vive asustada por el desempleado e inestable padre del bebé, Nick.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano y Rosaura se despiden con un beso mientras bailan felices. Maribella le confiesa a Gabriel que sus tiempos de modelo famosa ya están pasando junto con sus años.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio, cuando se queda solo con Rosaura, la abraza y trata de explicarle sus razones por haberla secuestrado, por ella no enamorarse de él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luisana corre a casa de Luis Mario para hacerle saber lo que le dijo Claudia, que la hija que está esperando Rosaura es también su hija. Luis Mario decide ir a hablar con Rosaura a la hacienda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La señora, a quien Rosaura le dejara su hija, llega a su casa muy asustada, para encontrarse con su hija Sonia, quien al reconocer a la niña ve que ahora tiene muchos dólares.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marbella está completamente desesperada ya que acaba de despertar y se da cuenta que ha quedado ciega. Luis Mario, junto a Gabriel y Guillermo, tratan de calmarla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando Karina se entera que Maribella tuvo un accidente por culpa de Luis Mario, comprende que Luis Mario ahora estará más amarrado a ella y así lo hace saber a su hermana.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Mientras Maximiliano está buceando solo, Minerva toma sol en el bote. Maximiliano mete la mano entre unas cuerdas y no la puede sacar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia, Caridad, y Panchita dan la noticia de la muerte de Maximiliano. Cuando Rosaura destapa un regalo, saca un muñeco sin cabeza. Luis Mario y Eva llevan a Maribella al apartamento de Gabriel.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva y Silvia entran a la casa de María Julia para exigirle a Karina que les entregue la carta de Maximiliano. Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel lo de Silvano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le informa a Eduarda y a Maribella que el comisario le dijo que no sabía nada de su hija. Maribella le dice a Luis Mario que ella le puede dar hijos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Imanol le dice a Adriana que le de otra oportunidad pero Adriana grita que lo odia y Iván sale, preguntándole a Imanol que fue lo que le hizo a ella para que lo odie.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Rosaura conversan sobre la pérdida de su hija. Adriana informa que ve muy mal a Imanol. Luis Mario trata de convencer a Rosaura de que no trabaje con Silvano. Ella no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Maribella así como Silvano y Rosaura se encuentran en el mismo restaurante. Teobaldo le pregunta a su abuela porque le dijo a Luis Mario que la niña se llamaba Angélica.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Guillermo está decepcionado porque Jimena se fue con Rodrigo a ver a Imanol. Luisana lo calma y le dice que tiene que darle tiempo. Luis Mario le cuenta a Eduarda la crisis que sufrió Maribella.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats rescue a man of many faces as they approach Alabasta. Sure, he’s good for a laugh, but they may regret pulling him out of the drink.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats arrive in Alabasta with precious little time to stop the rebellion. Sanji and Chopper are sent to gather supplies for a dangerous trip across the desert.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Captain Smoker has Luffy in his grasp until a fiery stranger creates a diversion, giving the Straw Hats a chance to make a break for it.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Luffy’s happy reunion is crudely interrupted by the Billions of Baroque Works. They may be outnumbered, but these brothers are no ordinary pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Before they can start their trek across the desert, Luffy and the Straw Hats are stopped at the shore by the cute – but formidable – Kung Fu Dugongs.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s crew encounters treacherous birds and man-eating foliage on its desert odyssey, and just when they think the coast is clear, a great disturbance emerges from beneath the sand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats cross paths with the Barbar Sand Pirates, and Ace runs into big trouble when he gets separated from the group.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Princess Vivi devises a plan to test the hearts of a gang of so-called rebels. They talk a good game, but will their bite measure up to their bark?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue their journey to Yuba, where a bittersweet reunion with a childhood friend awaits Princess Vivi.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fire Fist Ace is hired by two young boys to hunt down and capture a lethal bounty hunter known only as the Scorpion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Zoro, and Luffy get separated from the others. When the heat makes Luffy act even stranger than usual, his friends wonder if they joined the right pirate gang.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The assassins of Baroque Works gather at Spider’s Café, and the Straw Hats arrive at Yuba only to find it buried in sand.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile reveals himself to the Baroque Works assassins and discloses his dastardly plan for Alabasta. After departing Yuba, Luffy takes a stand that forces Vivi to rethink her mission.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi takes Luffy’s advice, and the Straw Hats head towards Rainbase for a confrontation with Crocodile. Karoo finally reaches the palace with Vivi’s warning for King Cobra.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leads a daring – but foolish – raid on Crocodile’s casino. His poor planning lands him behind bars with Captain Smoker – and more importantly, leaves Vivi unprotected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are stuck in the clink, King Cobra addresses the starving people of Nanohana. Will his unbelievable revelation drive his subjects past the brink of rebellion?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A royal imposter has the rebel army hell-bent on bringing Cobra’s reign to a violent end. Meanwhile, Luffy and his mates find themselves in deep trouble and even deeper water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji shows up in the nick of time to make the crocs cough up the key to Luffy’s freedom, but the ravenous reptiles spit up something else instead.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile snatches Vivi off the back of a giant crab, but Luffy’s not having it. The rubber-man goes toe-to-toe with the sandman in a battle that will end in bloodshed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile puts Luffy down for a never-ending dirt nap, and the Straw Hats get a lift from a crabby ally in their race to stop the looming rebellion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi arrives in Alubarna with just enough time to stop the rebellion, but the agents of Baroque Works lurk in every corner, waiting to sabotage her plans for peace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji buys Vivi some time by mixing it up with a foe of many faces. Outside Alubarna’s walls, Chopper and Usopp tangle with Miss Merry Christmas and her slugging sidekick.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp finally shows some courage by using a five-ton hammer to play whack-a-mole with Miss Merry Christmas. He may be bluffing, but the distraction lets Chopper zero in on the enemy’s weakness.

programme.title: Tetelestai

programme.desc: Abby gives each girl one solo dance for the next competition. However, she gives two solos to her star dancer, Maddie, clearly providing her with an advantage over the others.

programme.desc: Abby plays cupid with Brooke and her duet partner, hoping their off-stage romance will make on-stage drama.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.desc: A mousy bookkeeper embezzles $201,000 from his company only to be thwarted by his boss' beautiful secretary.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are on hallowed ground when a piece of marble from Abraham Lincoln's tomb enters the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: After years of begging Mike and Frank to let her go on a pick, Danielle finally gets her chance.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank challenge Danielle to sell a vintage carnival ride they've been storing for months. Meanwhile, the guys visit a collector with amazing pieces including an old gambling game used to get customers to spend more money.

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: Sean Connery is back as James Bond, hired to prevent madmen from exploding a nuclear device near picturesque Nassau in this explosive thriller which earned an Oscar for its special visual effects.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Just as Agent 007 finally discovers true love, he is thrown into spectacular action and danger in this entertaining adventure that stars George Lazenby as the charismatic Bond.

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: Roger Moore's debut as James Bond takes him in pursuit of a voodoo- worshipping underworld drug czar who leads him from Harlem to New Orleans to the exotic Caribbean. Jane Seymour also stars.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Gun
programme.desc: After his life is threatened, Roger Moore as 007 is lured into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with a million-dollar killer (Christopher Lee). Britt Ekland and Maud Adams co-star.

programme.title: The Spy Who Loved Me
programme.desc: Roger Moore as agent 007 teams with a beautiful Soviet agent (Barbara Bach) to battle Stromberg (Curt Jurgens) in order to save the world from total annihilation and a 315-pound villian, "Jaws" (Richard Kiel).

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: Roger Moore, in his fourth role as Agent 007, is sent to outer space to protect Britain and the world from a madman who would destroy the earth in this pulse-pounding, out-of-this-universe adventure.

programme.title: GoldenEye: el regreso del agente 007
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: El mundo no basta
programme.desc: Cuando el carismático agente 007 (Pierce Brosnan) es asignado para proteger a la bella heredera de un imperio petrolero, se ve envuelto en una apasionante aventura llena de adrenalina que lo enfrenta a uno de sus peores enemigos.

programme.title: Otro día para morir
programme.desc: James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) quita el freno para llevarte por un viaje inolvidable a través del mundo y lleno de adrenalina, en esta aventura cargada de acción.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The outbreak of World War III has occurred, leaving a group of mid-Westernrn high school students turned refugees to slowly organize themselves into an effective guerilla force.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: When sadistic thugs attack John Wick (Keanu Reeves) – a brilliantly lethal ex-assassin - he hunts them down with the skill and ruthlessness that made him an underworld legend.

programme.title: John Wick 2
programme.desc: John Wick is forced out of retirement, and this time, he must face off against a shadowy international assassins' guild and more of the world's deadliest killers.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: John Wick is on the run after killing a member of the international assassins' guild, and with a $14 million price tag on his head, he is the target of hit men and women everywhere.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: When sadistic thugs attack John Wick (Keanu Reeves) – a brilliantly lethal ex-assassin - he hunts them down with the skill and ruthlessness that made him an underworld legend.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: This episode features a variety of animals found on land, and in the sea. Find out how the badger is able to dig tunnels up to 13 feet deep. And why the Siberian tiger is the largest cat in the world.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Long rumored to be even more painful than the bite of a rattlesnake, Coyote will find out the effects of a desert centipede bite all in the name of science.

programme.title: Wild Connection
programme.desc: This program explores the formation of the Iberian Peninsula and its introduction of fascinating plants and animals to the ecosystems of Central America. With warm sheltering tropics and a mountainous north of wet and old Euro-Siberian forests.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: The adventure continues as Kristina journeys to Far and Wide in mountainous Nyanga, Eastern Zimbabwe. Her guide Bernie begins the trip with some extreme adventure sports including braving the tallest zip line on the planet.

programme.title: Fawn Identity
programme.desc: This is the story of two fawns, living parallel lives—one, an impala resident in the southern acacia forests, and the other, a Thompson's gazelle soon to be on the march with the great herds in the grasslands.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: Two large water birds are experiencing a real demographic boom that seems unstoppable.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and the crew discover a frog with transparent skin! Watch as Coyote introduces us to the 'glass frog.'

programme.title: Wildest Middle East: Egypt: Survivors in the Sands
programme.desc: Life in the decimate deserts of Egypt, seems impossible. However, beneath the surface Egypt is very much alive. Animals rule the land, skies, and surrounding seas and thrive in the amazing climate.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East: Jordan: Nature's Furnace
programme.desc: The natural world of the Middle East is governed by one natural force - the Sun. It claims its victims and breathes new life. The wildlife in Jordan faces some of the natural worlds greatest chalenges.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Nature has many weird creatures to offer and often these animals fascinate us the most.

programme.title: Walking Wild
programme.desc: Learning about orangutans and elephants.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote decides to put his hands to the test: how long can he withstand the heat of the hot springs?

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: Wetland habitats are essential freshwater ecosystems. They are a refuge for old growth forest and the species that depend upon them, at the core of the second largest biosphere reserve in Canada.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: One of the young cheetah cubs is rushed to the vet, but on the bright side, the feud between the foxes seems to be coming to an end. Legend, the serval, is struggling down the road to recovery.

programme.title: King of the Seas, Sea Eagle
programme.desc: The different habitats of the species in Europe.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: After finding out their boat was stolen, Cyril and his crew trek through the dense Amazon jungle and tread through waters where piranhas, caimans, and anacondas prowl on the hunt.

programme.title: Zoo Babies

programme.title: Fatal Attractions

programme.desc: Martin and Danny attempt to dodge a hail of bullets as a mercenary and his cronies try to kill their true target, an FBI detainee whom the agents are transporting.

programme.desc: The team's newest member, FBI rookie Elena Delgado, encounters a learning curve as she attempts to help search for missing 20-year-old Dina Kingston (PEYTON LIST).

programme.desc: The backpack and ID of missing Skye Petersen are suddenly dropped off at a thrift store seven years after Jack and ultimately the legal system determined she was murdered by her professor.

programme.desc: Jack and Danny head to Mexico to find a wealthy American vacationer who was abducted at gunpoint in front of his new wife, Lydia Costin (ALEX KINGSTON - "ER").

programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a man, Bill Shields (GORDON CLAPP), who reportedly let his marriage and career slip away after his teenaged daughter succumbed to leukemia.

programme.desc: Maggie and Dana struggle to find justice for victims murdered by a serial killer who left a ghoulish mark on all of his victims, while the mayor limits the investigation in order to prevent economical loss.

programme.desc: OA and Maggie team up with members of the FBI's Fugitives Department to track down a person wanted for murder who is also on America's top 10 most wanted list.

programme.desc: An American diplomat is killed while being used as a pawn in a dangerous drug ring, and the team must work together to bring them down.

programme.desc: When a controversial senior leader from Egypt comes to New York for a heart transplant, OA struggles to balance his personal opinion with his professional duty when he is assigned to the security detail.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A few days before his promotion to the command of the Sixth Fleet, RAdm Boone, an old acquaintance of Harmon Rabb, Sr.reminisces with Cmdr Harmon Harm Rabb, Jr. about the Vietnam war. Their conversation is interrupted by SECNAV who bears shocking news.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Congresswoman Latham and a colleague watch four marine jumpers jump into the ocean from an M22 Osprey. With two marines left to jump, the plane is struck by a swell in the ocean. Harm and Mac are instructed to investigate.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Late one evening, Harm receives a message from his ex-girlfriend. Harm returns the call and is devastated to find out that Parker is dead. Eager to help, Harm immediately makes plans to meet with Agent Kenworthy who will be leading the NCIS investigation.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: Everyone's on their best behavior for the Superintendent's visit but one of Ms. Feldman's students has other plans; Ms. Snap auditions for The Bachelor.

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: Ms. Watson deals with the fact that her ex may have moved on; Ms. Cannon tries to put a stop to teacher cliques.

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: Ms. Bennigan is assigned to teach a subject she's not comfortable with; Ms. Snap goes up against a helicopter parent.

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: The teachers say goodbye to another school year; Ms. Cannon's lack of gifts from her students makes her question her worth.

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: As the teachers return from summer break, Ms. Watson tries an ultra-premium online dating service and Ms. Snap learns that she's been given the worst group of kids in school. Mrs. Adler is assigned to a mobile classroom.

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: There's a trespasser at Fillmore and a new security guard is hired. Ms. Snap and Ms. Bennigan hold a "Women Empowering Women" workshop, Mrs. Adler takes stranger danger too far, and Ms. Watson purchases a male safety dummy.

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: When a tornado touches down near Fillmore, procedures go out the window as the teachers panic. Horrified by their negligence, Principal Pearson puts the teachers on probation until they complete a team-building course.

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: Mrs. Adler and her husband move into a tiny house. When Ms. Cannon's homemade jewelry shop fails, Ms. Watson and Ms. Snap try to boost her morale. Ms. Feldman fakes a lesson and Ms. Bennigan struggles with a student.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: After giving Holly's new boyfriend Paul a hard time, the guys make amends and Paul invites them to the party of a lifetime. But on the way, Stuart discovers that Paul's ex-wife might still be in the picture.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Desperate to impress her perfect sister Jill, Holly invents an alternative lifestyle for herself that quickly spirals out of control. Meanwhile, the guys are riding high on a "special" dish cooked up by Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil's client, tennis star Chuck Feeney, stays with the guys to hide from the paparazzi. But Chuck the ladies' man turns out to be more of a man's man. Haskell and Holly compete over who can take better care of pregnant Eden.guest star: Zach Braff

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang crashes a party on Phil's boss's yacht, where a very pregnant Eden goes into labor.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's boyfriend Paul orders the guys to not hang out with her when he's around. When Holly discovers what Paul did, she's forced to choose between poker night and date night.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly and Haskell compete for the affections of a woman who they both want to be a girlfriend. Stuart dates a sensitive woman and Phil dates a physical one when they discover that first impressions aren't always right.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria fakes having a disfiguring illness to improve her chances of winning a Daytime Emmy, and Melanie tries to reconnect with her college-age son Will.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: During a dangerous storm, Victoria is unable to fly to the Daytime Emmys, Joy is contacted by the son she put up for adoption, and Melanie blurts out a confession to Pete.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Elka has a familiar jail cellmate, Victoria's assets are frozen, Joy desperately needs Rick's help, and Melanie is irate with Pete for busting her friends.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: As Joy and Rick feign being a genuinely engaged couple, Melanie meets Pete's judgmental mother and is stunned when she finds out who Pete's brother is.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: With her trial for possessing stolen goods approaching, Elka is advised by her handsome lawyer Kirk to act senile, as Melanie, Victoria, and Joy compete for his affection.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus steals the Repository of the ghosts' corporeal bodies, but not before Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde nab one body to share between them. Then it's up to Pac, Cyli and Spiral to get the Repository back from the Netherworld...

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus. Let the games begin!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: An ancient artifact once belonging to Pac's parent's leads to a temple within a maze that may hold the secret to the Tree of Life.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The diabolical Dr. Buttocks clones an army of radio controlled prehistoric Pacasaursto attack Pacworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: In order to learn the secret location of the Repository, Betrayus possesses his mother's body while Dr.Buttocks hypnotizes the President.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: After Rosebud unwittingly tries to cook a talking squirrel, she and the kids are pulled into a squirrel-based dimension to be judged by a jury of their squirrel-peers. McGee has a bad dream where he strolls into the dining hall in his underwear!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: When a DISCO-BALL MOON rises over Lakebottom, Rosebud and Armand warn the kids to stop ALL partying at once, lest the strange Party Animal appears! The kids discover an elephant that befriends Gretch!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The staff try to up their Summerween game, by building a haunted house that will scare the bottomdwellers! The kids are now stuck inside the House of Horrors, determined to figure out who Gluteus Crouch really is!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: A storm gives McGee a nasal infection that allows him to see the future. When Slimey ditches the bottomdwellers, the kids are determined to find out where he went.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: An old McGee travels back from the future to present-day to stop a BBQ that infects the staff with MONSTER VIRUS! After the letters that McGee wrote to his mom are returned to sender, the Lakebottom Crew hits the road to find out what happened.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The kids' emotional last week at camp is rocked when they discover that two NEW campers are joining them at Lakebottom. The kids challenge Buttsquat to the Camp Lakebottom Classic! Sadly, Buttsquat keeps winning!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Willy is faced with having to pass a crucial math test that will determine whether he has to go to a summer self-guided class that has just one other student, his nemesis, Buzz.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: When Willy asks to sign up for a camping trip with Quincy and Alissa, Rock and Crystal decide it would be a great opportunity to spend quality time with their son if they organized a trip for Willy and his pals instead.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Willy finds himself on the verge of being expelled from school after a series of un-fortunate events pin him as a disrespectful student, who is banning the students together to take over the school.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: When Rock notices that another heavy metal star has his own reality television show, he calls his manager and demands a show about himself and his family.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Due to a government accounting error, the Zillas find themselves flat broke and with no place to live.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: A Swiss exchange student is en route to billet with the Zillas for International Student Week.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Rock is due to receive an honorary doctorate from his old alma mater.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: After years on the road, Willy and the rest of the Zilla clan arrive in their new, adopted hometown of Silent Springs.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Willy and his mom decide to get involved with the local Christmas pageant.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelyn chooses adoption during a weekend retreat with other birth moms, while Maci and Ryan reach out to a counselor. Amber thinks about accepting help from her ex, and Farrah wonders if she should stay home more with her baby.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber wants to put an end to the fighting and move away from Gary. Farrah can't stand living under her parents' roof anymore. Maci struggles to keep up in school when her son starts walking. Catelyn and Tyler plan their future.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah calls the police on her own mother. Amber faces a pregnancy scare. Maci takes her ex, Ryan, to court for child support. Catelynn is upset that she has to move out of her boyfriend's house and back in with her family.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn gets caught in a lie. Amber's boyfriend might leave her for someone else. Farrah juggles college, a new job, and moving houses - all with her daughter Sophia. Maci tries to move into a house with her college friends.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci reconnects with an old flame on Valentine's Day. Their crying baby and unrealistic expectations ruin Amber and Gary's romantic dinner. Catelynn's boyfriend struggles about the adoption. Farrah reveals an emotional secret.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Gary take a vacation. Maci and Ryan butt heads over Ryan's new girlfriend. Farrah's mom is offered a plea bargain for their physical altercation. Catelynn finds out Tyler is still angry at her about a past lie.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler find their high school romance back on the rocks when Catelynn reveals another lie - and it ruins a visit to their adoption agent. Gary dresses up as a bunny for Leah on Easter, but a big fight makes Amber question their engagement.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci questions whether her boyfriend Kyle is ready to date a teen mom and be a real part of her son's life, while Farrah tries speed dating. Amber works toward her GED until she realizes that finishing high school with a baby is harder than she expected.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: An argument about the adoption ruins Catelynn's day shopping for prom dresses with her mom, but she and Tyler get a nice surprise at prom; Maci is heartbroken when Ryan announces he's taking her to court over custody of Bentley.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Gary's wedding plans fall apart over an argument about how to raise Leah, while Farrah considers moving back into her mother's house. Catelynn and Tyler celebrate their daughter Carly's first birthday from afar by calling her to say hello.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah reaches out to Sophia's dad's family in an attempt to get Social Security benefits for Sophia. Maci tells Ryan she is moving to Nashville, while Catelynn and Tyler learn Butch has ended up back in jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber lashes out at Gary when he threatens to take Leah away. Catelynn and Tyler find out they will not graduate from High School on time. Maci tries to work out a visitation schedule with Ryan. Farrah has an emotional reunion.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler learn they will get to go visit Carly for the first time in a year. Amber breaks it off with Gary for good and starts dating a new guy, and Farrah learns the results of Sophia's DNA test.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cate and Tyler find out they are pregnant so Cate wants to get married in a courthouse. Maci struggles to co-parent with Ryan. Amber falls for Gary's flirting but then is crushed when he goes on a family vacation with his new girlfriend and Leah.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco firma los documentos que lo acreditan como el propietario de la fortuna de Eduvina Trueba, aunque Juan persuade a su hermano para evitar que arruine su vida con una mujer mayor que él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eduvina no sigue las órdenes de su médico, Franco tampoco calma su euforia y las consecuencias son inevitables. Juan y Óscar quieren irse del pueblo, imaginan a su hermano en una luna de miel.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco le pide ayuda a Juan y a Óscar, su hermano mayor se niega hasta que Eva lo convence para que acepte. Jimena consigue trabajo, Fernando llega con Pepita a la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes asumen sus responsabilidades en la hacienda, pasan los meses y Norma da a luz a su bebé, Jimena tiene éxito en su trabajo aunque extraña a Óscar, él no aguanta los celos al verla.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta la decisión de su hermano porque es la oportunidad para acercarse a Norma, ella se preocupa cuando ve a Fernando con su bebé. Jimena le muestra a Ruth unas fotos de Libia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita se encuentra con el nuevo dueño de la hacienda Trueba, con quien tiene una fuerte discusión, ella cae del caballo y se desmaya, cuando despierta está en la habitación de Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita y Franco pelean de nuevo, esta vez delante de todos los invitados a la fiesta en honor a los Reyes. Juan muere de celos al ver a Fernando con Gabriela, teme que Norma haya vuelto con él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llama a una ambulancia para salvar a Óscar, Juan confirma que las Elizondo saben todo sobre Libia. Eva confiesa lo que hizo y su rencor hacia Gabriela y revela el secreto de su hija.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma y Jimena llegan a la hacienda y se enteran de la traición de Eva, Fernando y Sara quieren denunciarla a ella y a los Reyes, mientras Gabriela retiene a sus hijas para protegerlas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Se arma una fuerte pelea cuando los Reyes llegan a la hacienda para hablar con Norma y Jimena. Eva se va de la hacienda por orden de Fernando y Raquel le prohíbe que se acerque a su hija Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco firma los documentos que lo acreditan como el propietario de la fortuna de Eduvina Trueba, aunque Juan persuade a su hermano para evitar que arruine su vida con una mujer mayor que él.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning THE AMAZING RACE returns with the first reality showdown among some of the most memorable and competitive players from THE AMAZING RACE, SURVIVOR and BIG BROTHER.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers have a big decision to make when they face a surprise double U-turn in Laos.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Vietnam where they must master synchronized dancing, karaoke singing and fishing for prawns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Enemies are made when one team steals another team's taxi in Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a leap of faith when choosing which detour challenge to take on. And, a split-second decision may make or break one team's life.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams must drum up enough strength for an intense head-to-head battle before checking into the mat.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Teams travel to Switzerland where they free-fall over 400 feet into the Gletscherschlucht Glacier Gorge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Switzerland, teams are surprised with the first ever public U-turn vote, where racers have to vote in front of each other.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a bumpy ride in Split, Croatia and try not to get tongue-twisted reciting poetry while in motion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams try not to crack while transporting eggs across town by bicycle in the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million on the line, the final four teams race through London. The team to cross the finish line first will be crowned the winners!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race" celebrates travelling one million miles around the world when the 32nd race kicks off from Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Bogotá, Colombia, where they encounter the "Yield," which gives them the power to stop another team's race for a designated amount of time.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's perennial romance with Helen is jolted a bit when Andy's old high school sweetheart moves back to town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee allows her superstitions dictate her decision to be a brief co-owner of a Chinese restaurant.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd decides to give up his Mayberry barbershop when Howard Sprague buys the building and raises the rent fifteen dollars a month.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Aunt Bee learn their ancestor was the state's biggest swindler, just before the town of Mayberry unveils his statue as a hero.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Helen writes a children's book that will be published and Andy faces the uncomfortable prospect of being the fiance of a famous writer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie face the difficult problem of helping an old milk-wagon horse find contentment in retirement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie insists on studying piano until he finds out that football practice and piano practice conflict.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Staid Howard Sprague becomes a comedian and gets on a TV amateur hour.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard volunteers to become the Big Brother of a high school boy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is distressed when Opie receives a failing grade for his school essay naming him his most unforgettable character.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober faces disaster when a printing error awards Floyd a large cash prize in his gas station contest.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mary Alice Carter accepts Opie's invitation to a party but rejects him at the eleventh hour for another.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard, a last minute substitution for a bowling team sponsored by Emmett's fix-it shop, astonishes everyone by bowling a perfect game.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee goes to Mexico with her two best friends but the trip tests their friendship.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy doesn't tell Helen that the lawyer he worked with in Raleigh is a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy sends Opie to an affluent boys' camp.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard begins dating Millie but her ex-boyfriend still carries a torch and threatens him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, summoned for jury duty, disagrees with fellow jurors on her first case.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie disobeys Andy and secretly tape-records a bank robber's confession.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie joins a rock 'n' roll group and starts getting failing grades in school.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A charming lecturer is enamored with Aunt Bee who reminds him of his late wife.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy opens a coin laundry to save money for Opie's college education.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard proposes to Millie after three months of dating but soon realizes they may be rushing it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy learns his cousin Bradford is a broke phony, but keeps quiet because Aunt Bee thinks he's a wealthy relative.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy catches the flu and Goober takes over as his deputy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard quits his boring job as county clerk and becomes a Caribbean island beachcomber.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober buys the gas station with financial backing from Andy and Emmett.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on this colorful Bob Ross display of nature's exciting seashore panarama … beautifully tucked within an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Team up with Bob Ross and travel back to the days of swimming in that lovely secluded river bend; bring back memories of a forgotten time.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a leisurely stroll with Bob Ross and gather your thoughts in the quiet misty woodlands; this lovely masterpiece is a great lesson in using the knife.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft, serene and near silent, this Bob Ross painting is simple and elegant, with just a lone cabin nestled comfortably into pillows of snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross transforms a zany looking canvas into a gorgeous, soft wooded scene with radiant sun glowing over opulent trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Powerful mountains softened with grassy meadows and little evergreens framing a nice shiny mere - this is a lovely Bob Ross masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Magnificent jewels in an oval - this Bob Ross painting highlights countless numbers of colors in nature's sky and foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Elegant mountain lake, silent and still, reflecting the natural beauty of leafy trees and grasses all around - a pretty Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Autumn is the threshold to winter, but still with glorious color and warmth in Bob Ross' trees, sky and buttery ground cover.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real viewer favorite! With silky shades pink, mauve and lilac, Bob Ross completes an amazing birch tree landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A regal vista on canvas, Bob Ross paints incredible mountains and waterfall enclosed by proud evergreens and mossy cliffs.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even the oval in this delightful Bob Ross cabin-by-the-river painting cannot contain all the succulent, glorious foliage!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A partially blackened canvas is all you need to start creating this dark, mood-filled misty waterfall scene with artist Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A truly graceful scene, as if floating in air -- icy pond and weather-worn cabin -- is today's Bob Ross winter landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a breathtakingly beautiful seascape on black canvas today, complete with fierce skies, jagged cliff and raging ocean waves.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A different kind of oval today! - Bob Ross paints a pretty, panoramic cold mountain lake scene inside this fun frame.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross teams up with Mother Nature and paints an incredibly awesome sky hovering over fantastic, snow-covered mountains and glass-like reflections.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In a densely covered spot hidden far from the nearest roadway lies a softly nestled quiet little pond; Bob Ross invites you to take a peek.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A visit with Bob Ross takes you to a secluded cabin, snuggled deep into the blankety drifts of fluffy snow, far into the frozen mountains.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross employs some of his well-known oval magic to paint a lovely cabin scene situated in a serene, soft little rolling pasture.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross spills an amazing cornucopia of red, brown, green and gold colors into this gorgeous fall mountain masterpiece - a real audience favorite.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a clear windless day, where reflections are so smooth they appear to be crystal likenesses of the mountains above.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes a detour from the trail and discovers a rarely used trail through country woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel deep into the forest with Bob Ross and discover the beauty and serenity of an elegant waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Steve Ross as he creates a lovely oval painting, a winter landscape surrounding a frozen lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It's such a tranquil day down at the beach! Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely little rowboat that awaits its owner's return.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with Bob Ross and visit the north in the middle of winter! Snow and ice abound in a profusion of beauty.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Thirty Elite Agents learn that they will be battling against one another in a spy-themed season, with the hopes of earning their share of a $1,000,000 prize. Former champions find themselves in danger, as a cutthroat plan emerges to take them down.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Agents compete in freezing temperatures during the "Mission: Ice Spy" challenge, where alliances are put on blast. Romance emerges between one pair of strong agents. One agent plots against her own partner, in the hopes that he will be eliminated.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Fessy's exposed lies about the secret vote cause concern within his alliance. Agents must wrestle against each other on top of a speeding truck during an explosive "Mission: Road Kill" challenge. An emotional Agent pushes two other players' buttons.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Loyalty is tested in a volatile new partnership. Agents must put their intel skills to the test while in a lava tunnel during "Mission: Drone Control." A stunning battle in The Crater causes ripples that will impact numerous Agents.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: After one Agent is unexpectedly deactivated, TJ institutes a shocking security breach, which shakes up partnerships. The Agents compete in "Mission: Agent Down" where they must overcome their fears of heights. A group of strong Rookies align.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: When rumors spread about Theresa's loyalties, she quickly becomes public enemy number one. A pair of strong Agents find their partnership struggling during the arduous "Mission: Smuggle Run.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Fallout from a shocking blindside puts a target on a strong pair of Agents. Devin presses an Agent's buttons, resulting in another night of mayhem. Agents must face their fears while hanging off of a helicopter during "Mission: Aerial Takedown.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Aneesa and Olympian Lolo Jones get into a heated exchange during the muddy "Mission: All Brawl." CT starts to worry about his partnership with Big T. Amber M becomes suspicious of one of her closest friends in the game.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: One Agent is put on blast after trying to appease both her alliance and her new group of friends. TJ forces the Agents to participate in his favorite game, trivia, during "Mission: Interrogation." Old grudges resurface, as two rivals go head to head.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Two Agents' attraction to one another heats up to a new level, while Lolo and Nam's relationship grows cold and distant. After a major win during "Mission: Black Sand Ops" the Double Agents struggle to get on the same page.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: CT grows worried that he may be locked out of getting a Gold Skull and decides to train Big T for battle. One agent's unforgettable performance shocks everyone during the high-flying "Mission: Air Lift." TJ drops a bomb that no one saw coming.

programme.title: The President's Daily Brief Situation Report
programme.desc: The First is the new network for free speech and big ideas. The First is designed for conservative Americans, featuring intelligent analysis from hosts Dana Loesch, Buck Sexton, Jesse Kelly and other top talent.

programme.title: The Sean Spicer Show
programme.desc: The Sean Spicer Show goes beyond conventional political commentary. conventional political commentary. Each episode will unveil the narratives that remain obscured from the public eye and expose the hidden agendas shaping the information we consume.

programme.title: Bill O'Reilly: No Spin News

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia takes on a pro bono case where the witness quickly becomes the prime suspect, but it's Lockhart & Gardner that may be in the most jeopardy, as Will and Diane consider their futures and the firm's direction.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When Alicia's key witness commits suicide, she must turn to the only person whose testimony can salvage her case: Colin Sweeney. Meanwhile, Eli makes big moves on Peter's behalf.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia worries that she will break confidentiality when the Treasury Department forces her to report on her latest client, while Peter reluctantly digs into Will's past transgressions.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia races to win a stay of execution for a guilty man who has information which will keep another client from a murder conviction. Meanwhile, Eli tries to get ahead of a client's potential scandal and Kalinda may have met her match.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Tensions are high at Lockhart & Gardner as Alicia and Will argue in front of a mercurial military judge, Eli's confidence is shaken and Diane issues an ultimatum to protect the firm.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Lockhart & Gardner's future is at stake when a couple whose divorce was overseen by the firm accuses them of encouraging the breakup for financial gain.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack in Kenya as he tracks a trio of hunting cheetahs, braves a pack of scavenging jackals, and then with his wife Sue meets an extremely endangered and undeniably cute baby black rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an underground adventure with Bats, Bears, Wombats, Rosy Bee-Eaters, and Iguanas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Mt. Kenya where not one, but two extinct species are about to make a comeback. Come along with Jack as he discovers how the elusive bongo antelope and the stunning white zebra are being reintroduced Into the Wild.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Wild Countdown is turning 100! Join Jungle Jack as he celebrates by counting down his favorite adventures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes to work behind the scenes at the world-renowned Ann van Dyk Cheetah Center in South Africa where over 800 Cheetah cubs have been bred in the last 40 years. Jack also comes face-to-face with rare African Wild Dogs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he visits one of his favorite African destinations while enjoying beautiful unspoiled vistas, meeting amazing Masai people, and getting up close and personal with the animal population, including lions, elephants, hyenas, ostriches, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet six exotic species and the habitats they call home sweet home. Corals in Curacao, Galapagos marine iguanas, Borneo’s orangutans, Tasmanian devils, mountain gorillas in Rwanda and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack's taking a Jungle Cruise through the Amazon as he searches for elusive pink river dolphins. But, along the way, Jack gets a lot more than he bargained for… from a sloth to giant river otters and even anacondas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Reptile Round-Up
programme.desc: Some slither, others climb and a few pack a heck of a punch… today, it’s the reptiles! Join Jack and the king cobra, snaconda, tortoise, chameleon and more cold-blooded creatures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Predators
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six ravenous encounters with mighty carnivores at the top of the food chain. Grizzly bears, Nile crocs, lions, African wild dogs, tiger sharks and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is in Malaysia getting a little closer than he would like to lots and lots of crocodiles! Then he has an unforgettable encounter with a King Cobra before trekking up into Batu Caves just outside of Kuala Lampur.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and Suzi for a journey to La Paz Waterfall Gardens in Costa Rica where they meet local species, like sloths, hummingbirds, and jaguars, thriving in the rainforest.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of Africa's best national parks, like the world-famous Serengeti, Botswana's Chobe National Park, and Lope National Park in Gabon. Forest elephants, Leopards, Hippos, Crocs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is counting down the loud mouths of the animal world. Howler monkeys, sperm whales, wolves and lions are just a few of the famous talkers on today’s show. Find out which “call of the wild” is the loudest of all!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he hits the road in search of amazing animal adventures. Elephant seals with their own freeway exit, a drive to the end of the Earth for dolphins, a Thai elephant expressway, and more epic road trips!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Countdown to Discovery
programme.desc: Join Jack as he meets up with six of the planet’s most recently discovered animals, like the elusive okapi, adorable pygmy hippo, rare sun-tailed monkey, highly endangered mountain gorilla, the see-through Fijian crested iguana, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Africa and the front lines of this growing threat to see what can be done to save the rhino from extinction. Jack meets the conservationists who are fighting back using every possible option.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of nature’s most fearsome fangs. Hippos, Rattlesnakes, Baboons, Bats, Lions, and Devils!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets up with some of nature’s biggest eaters! Crocs, African wild dogs, bears, gorillas, lions, jackals and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he searches for the greatest ape species, like Gorillas, Orangutans, Chimpanzees, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Picky Eaters
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on six species that take picky eating to the extreme! A panda that brunches on bamboo, marsupials that munch on eucalyptus, flamingoes that savor the flavor of algae, plus many more finicky eaters are on today’s countdown menu.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Hospitals
programme.desc: Jack visits the doctors and hospitals that care for creatures big and small – from Silverback Gorillas and lightning-quick cheetahs to pet pigs and rescued possums. Today, see some of the world’s outstanding animal hospitals in action!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Getting Around
programme.desc: Traveling the world in search of exotic animals, like migrating wildebeest, rare mountain gorillas, and amazing underwater sea life, Jungle Jack has hitched rides on hot-air balloons, camels, and even submarines!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he travels to the remote Sukau River on the island of Borneo in Malaysia where he gets a seldom-seen look at pygmy elephants as they emerge from the rain forest.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits a breeding project focused on saving the endangered condor, the largest flying bird in the world. With its unique location in the middle of prime condor habitat, “condor Hausi” hopes to reproduce the massive bird in captivity.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's on a mission in Kenya and he's heading straight for the world's largest land mammals -- African elephants and white rhinos! Jack never forgets the little guys, join in as he uncovers some delicate and vital relationships in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Wealthy Alaskan Buddy Bowers (Lorne Greene) recruits the services of the ship to take the wedding party from Vancouver, B.C., to Skagway, Alaska, for the nuptial ceremonies for his orphaned granddaughter, Carol (Lisa Hartman).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Doc (Bernie Kopell) gets the flu, he receives private treatment from a gorgeous doctor (Susan Sullivan) who keeps his fever up even when his temperature drops.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) has trouble on the high seas when the Love Boat crew discovers he has included some racy tales about them in his new novel.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Julie (Lauren Tewes) joins the ship's secret all-male club, she is shocked by the initiation rites.

programme.title: The Love Boat
